Coverage for views / creators.py: 50.90%

1""" 

2Creator Intelligence Dashboard - Analytics-first design for YouTube creators 

3Focused on what matters: Growth, Revenue, Engagement, Quality 

4 

5Data collected by worker: 

6- current_subscribers, current_view_count, current_video_count (from YouTube API) 

7- engagement_score (calculated from recent video comments/likes) 

8- quality_grade (A+/A/B+/B/C based on engagement + subscriber size) 

9- country_code, channel_name, channel_thumbnail_url 

10- last_updated_at, last_synced_at (for freshness indicator) 

11- 30-day deltas (subscribers_change_30d, views_change_30d) 

12 

13Creator perspective (Jimmy Donaldson style): 

141. Growth trajectory (trending up/down?) - MOST IMPORTANT 

152. Revenue potential (monthly earnings) 

163. Engagement quality (audience size vs views ratio) 

174. Video consistency (how many videos, posting frequency) 

185. Ranking/position (competitive benchmark) 

196. Quality assessment (why are they ranked this way?) 

20""" 

21 

22from __future__ import annotations 

23 

24import json 

25import logging 

26import re as _re # private alias — wildcard `from fasthtml.common import *` cannot shadow it 

27from collections.abc import Callable 

28from urllib.parse import urlencode, unquote, quote, quote_plus, urlparse 

29 

30from fasthtml.common import * 

31from monsterui.all import * 

32 

33from utils import format_date_relative, format_number, safe_get_value, slugify 

34from utils.creator_metrics import ( 

35 calculate_avg_views_per_video, 

36 calculate_growth_rate, 

37 calculate_momentum_score, 

38 calculate_views_per_subscriber, 

39 estimate_monthly_revenue_v4, 

40 get_momentum_label, 

41 format_channel_age, 

42 get_activity_badge, 

43 get_activity_title, 

44 get_age_emoji, 

45 get_age_title, 

46 get_country_flag, 

47 get_grade_info, 

48 get_growth_signal, 

49 get_language_emoji, 

50 get_language_name, 

51 get_sync_status_badge, 

52) 

53from db import calculate_creator_stats, get_creator_hero_stats 

54from components.category_stats import render_category_box_plots 

55 

56logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) 

57 

58 

59# ============================================================================ 

60# SOCIAL LINK EXTRACTION HELPERS 

61# ============================================================================ 

62# FrankenUI uses Lucide icons directly — UkIcon("name") maps 1-to-1 to Lucide. 

63# Lucide stopped accepting new brand icons in 2022, so only these social 

64# platforms have native icons: 

65# instagram twitter facebook linkedin github youtube mail 

66# Semantic fallbacks for platforms without a Lucide brand icon: 

67# TikTok → "music" Twitch → "monitor-play" 

68# Discord → "message-circle" Patreon → "heart" Linktree → "link" 

69 

70# Each entry: (compiled_regex, lucide_icon, display_label, url_template) 

71_SOCIAL_PATTERNS = [ 

72 # ── Native Lucide brand icons ───────────────────────────────────────────── 

73 ( 

74 _re.compile(r"instagram\.com/(?!(?:p|reel|stories|explore)/)([\w.]+)", _re.I), 

75 "instagram", 

76 "Instagram", 

77 "https://instagram.com/{}", 

78 ), 

79 ( 

80 _re.compile(r"(?:instagram|ig)[:\s]+@?([\w.]+)", _re.I), 

81 "instagram", 

82 "Instagram", 

83 "https://instagram.com/{}", 

84 ), 

85 ( 

86 _re.compile(r"(?:twitter|x)\.com/([\w]+)", _re.I), 

87 "twitter", 

88 "X / Twitter", 

89 "https://x.com/{}", 

90 ), 

91 ( 

92 _re.compile(r"twitter[:\s]+@?([\w]+)", _re.I), 

93 "twitter", 

94 "X / Twitter", 

95 "https://x.com/{}", 

96 ), 

97 ( 

98 _re.compile(r"facebook\.com/([\w.]+)", _re.I), 

99 "facebook", 

100 "Facebook", 

101 "https://facebook.com/{}", 

102 ), 

103 ( 

104 _re.compile(r"linkedin\.com/(?:in|company)/([\w-]+)", _re.I), 

105 "linkedin", 

106 "LinkedIn", 

107 "https://linkedin.com/in/{}", 

108 ), 

109 ( 

110 _re.compile(r"github\.com/([\w-]+)", _re.I), 

111 "github", 

112 "GitHub", 

113 "https://github.com/{}", 

114 ), 

115 # ── Semantic fallbacks (no Lucide brand icon exists) ────────────────────── 

116 ( 

117 _re.compile(r"tiktok\.com/@([\w.]+)", _re.I), 

118 "music", 

119 "TikTok", 

120 "https://tiktok.com/@{}", 

121 ), 

122 ( 

123 _re.compile(r"(?:tiktok|tt)[:\s]+@?([\w.]+)", _re.I), 

124 "music", 

125 "TikTok", 

126 "https://tiktok.com/@{}", 

127 ), 

128 ( 

129 _re.compile(r"twitch\.tv/([\w]+)", _re.I), 

130 "monitor-play", 

131 "Twitch", 

132 "https://twitch.tv/{}", 

133 ), 

134 ( 

135 _re.compile(r"discord\.gg/([\w-]+)", _re.I), 

136 "message-circle", 

137 "Discord", 

138 "https://discord.gg/{}", 

139 ), 

140 ( 

141 _re.compile(r"patreon\.com/([\w-]+)", _re.I), 

142 "heart", 

143 "Patreon", 

144 "https://patreon.com/{}", 

145 ), 

146 ( 

147 _re.compile(r"linktr\.ee/([\w-]+)", _re.I), 

148 "link", 

149 "Linktree", 

150 "https://linktr.ee/{}", 

151 ), 

152 # ── Generic website catch-all (must be last) ────────────────────────────── 

153 # group(1) = full URL (used as href); group(2) = bare domain (used for _SKIP_DOMAINS check) 

154 ( 

155 _re.compile( 

156 r"(https?://(?:www\.)?([\w.-]+\.[a-z]{2,})(?:/[^\s]*)?)", 

157 _re.I, 

158 ), 

159 "globe", 

160 "Website", 

161 "{}", 

162 ), 

163] 

164 

165_EMAIL_RE = _re.compile(r"\b([A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,})\b") 

166 

167# Domains to skip in the catch-all so social platforms don't appear twice 

168_SKIP_DOMAINS = frozenset( 

169 { 

170 "youtube.com", 

171 "youtu.be", 

172 "instagram.com", 

173 "twitter.com", 

174 "x.com", 

175 "tiktok.com", 

176 "facebook.com", 

177 "twitch.tv", 

178 "github.com", 

179 "patreon.com", 

180 "discord.gg", 

181 "linkedin.com", 

182 "linktr.ee", 

183 "t.co", 

184 "bit.ly", 

185 "google.com", 

186 "wikipedia.org", 

187 "goo.gl", 

188 "amzn.to", 

189 } 

190) 

191 

192# Brand-accurate colours keyed by Lucide icon name 

193_SOCIAL_COLOURS = { 

194 "instagram": "text-pink-500 hover:text-pink-600", 

195 "twitter": "text-sky-500 hover:text-sky-600", 

196 "facebook": "text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700", 

197 "linkedin": "text-blue-700 hover:text-blue-800", 

198 "github": "text-foreground hover:text-primary", 

199 "youtube": "text-red-600 hover:text-red-700", 

200 "mail": "text-violet-600 hover:text-violet-700", 

201 "music": "text-foreground hover:text-primary", # TikTok 

202 "monitor-play": "text-purple-600 hover:text-purple-700", # Twitch 

203 "message-circle": "text-indigo-500 hover:text-indigo-600", # Discord 

204 "heart": "text-rose-500 hover:text-rose-600", # Patreon 

205 "link": "text-emerald-600 hover:text-emerald-700", # Linktree 

206 "globe": "text-emerald-600 hover:text-emerald-700", 

207} 

208 

209 

210def _extract_socials(bio: str, keywords: str) -> list[tuple[str, str, str]]: 

211 """ 

212 Parse social links and emails from bio + keywords text. 

213 

214 Returns a deduplicated list of (lucide_icon, label, href) tuples, 

215 capped at 8 entries. 

216 """ 

217 text = f"{bio or ''} {keywords or ''}".strip() 

218 if not text: 218 ↛ 221line 218 didn't jump to line 221 because the condition on line 218 was always true

219 return [] 

220 

221 found: list[tuple[str, str, str]] = [] 

222 seen: set[str] = set() 

223 

224 # Emails first — highest-value contact signal 

225 for email in _EMAIL_RE.findall(text): 

226 href = f"mailto:{email}" 

227 if href not in seen: 

228 found.append(("mail", email, href)) 

229 seen.add(href) 

230 

231 # Social patterns in priority order (specific before generic) 

232 for pattern, icon, label, url_tpl in _SOCIAL_PATTERNS: 

233 for m in pattern.finditer(text): 

234 if icon == "globe": 

235 # group(1) = full URL, group(2) = bare domain 

236 full_url = m.group(1) 

237 domain = m.group(2).lower() 

238 if any(skip in domain for skip in _SKIP_DOMAINS): 

239 continue 

240 href = full_url 

241 else: 

242 handle = m.group(1).strip("/ .") 

243 if not handle or len(handle) < 2: 

244 continue 

245 href = url_tpl.format(handle) 

246 if href not in seen: 

247 found.append((icon, label, href)) 

248 seen.add(href) 

249 

250 return found[:8] 

251 

252 

253# Matches youtube.com (with or without www) and the youtu.be short-link domain. 

254_YT_URL_RE = _re.compile(r"https?://(?:(?:www\.)?youtube\.com|youtu\.be)/\S+", _re.I) 

255 

256 

257def _parse_featured_channels(raw: str) -> list[str]: 

258 """Parse featured_channels_urls (newline/comma/space separated) → YouTube URLs. 

259 

260 Accepts both ``youtube.com`` and ``youtu.be`` variants. 

261 """ 

262 if not raw: 262 ↛ 264line 262 didn't jump to line 264 because the condition on line 262 was always true

263 return [] 

264 seen: set[str] = set() 

265 result = [] 

266 for u in _re.split(r"[\n,\s]+", raw.strip()): 

267 u = u.strip() 

268 if u and _YT_URL_RE.match(u) and u not in seen: 

269 seen.add(u) 

270 result.append(u) 

271 return result[:6] 

272 

273 

274# Topic Category to Emoji Mapping (for topicCategories from YouTube API) 

275# These are Wikipedia-based categories distinct from video categoryId 

276TOPIC_CATEGORY_EMOJI_MAP = { 

277 "music": "🎵", 

278 "gaming": "🎮", 

279 "video game": "🎮", 

280 "game": "🎮", 

281 "sport": "⚽", 

282 "basketball": "🏀", 

283 "baseball": "⚾", 

284 "football": "🏈", 

285 "soccer": "⚽", 

286 "entertainment": "🎬", 

287 "film": "🎬", 

288 "movie": "🎬", 

289 "television": "📺", 

290 "education": "🎓", 

291 "knowledge": "📚", 

292 "science": "🔬", 

293 "technology": "💻", 

294 "food": "🍳", 

295 "lifestyle": "🏠", 

296 "cooking": "🍳", 

297 "health": "💪", 

298 "fitness": "💪", 

299 "art": "🎨", 

300 "performing arts": "🎭", 

301 "society": "🎪", 

302 "culture": "🎪", 

303 "news": "📰", 

304 "politics": "🏛️", 

305 "comedy": "😂", 

306 "humor": "😂", 

307 "travel": "✈️", 

308 "nature": "🌿", 

309 "animals": "🐾", 

310 "pets": "🐾", 

311 "fashion": "👗", 

312 "beauty": "💄", 

313 "diy": "🔨", 

314 "craft": "✂️", 

315 "business": "💼", 

316 "finance": "💰", 

317 "automotive": "🚗", 

318 "vehicle": "🚗", 

319} 

320 

321 

322def get_topic_category_emoji(category_name: str) -> str: 

323 """ 

324 Get emoji for a topic category name. 

325 

326 Args: 

327 category_name: Topic category name (e.g., "Music", "Video game culture") 

328 

329 Returns: 

330 Emoji string (e.g., "🎵", "🎮") 

331 

332 Examples: 

333 get_topic_category_emoji("Music") → "🎵" 

334 get_topic_category_emoji("Video game culture") → "🎮" 

335 get_topic_category_emoji("Entertainment") → "🎬" 

336 """ 

337 if not category_name: 

338 return "🏷️" 

339 

340 name_lower = category_name.lower() 

341 

342 # Try to find a matching emoji 

343 for key, emoji in TOPIC_CATEGORY_EMOJI_MAP.items(): 

344 if key in name_lower: 

345 return emoji 

346 

347 # Default fallback 

348 return "🏷️" 

349 

350 

351def _filter_valid_creators(creators: list[dict]) -> list[dict]: 

352 """ 

353 Filter out creators with incomplete data. 

354 

355 Only shows creators that have: 

356 - A channel_name (successfully resolved) 

357 - At least 1 subscriber (data has been synced) 

358 

359 This prevents showing empty "Sync Pending" cards. 

360 """ 

361 

362 def get_val(obj, key, default=None): 

363 if isinstance(obj, dict): 

364 v = obj.get(key, default) 

365 else: 

366 v = getattr(obj, key, default) 

367 return v if v is not None else default 

368 

369 valid = [] 

370 for creator in creators: 

371 channel_name = get_val(creator, "channel_name") 

372 subs = get_val(creator, "current_subscribers", 0) 

373 

374 if channel_name and subs > 0: 

375 valid.append(creator) 

376 

377 return valid 

378 

379 

380# ============================================================================ 

381# URL CONSTRUCTION HELPERS 

382# ============================================================================ 

383 

384 

385def _build_filter_url( 

386 *, 

387 sort: str, 

388 search: str, 

389 grade: str = "all", 

390 language: str = "all", 

391 activity: str = "all", 

392 age: str = "all", 

393 country: str = "all", 

394 category: str = "all", 

395 page: int = None, 

396 per_page: int = None, 

397) -> str: 

398 """ 

399 Central helper for building /creators filter URLs. 

400 

401 Ensures all filter links stay in sync when query parameters change. 

402 By consolidating URL construction here, we prevent parameter divergence 

403 and reduce maintenance overhead. 

404 

405 Args: 

406 sort: Sort criteria (subscribers, views, engagement, etc.) 

407 search: Search query string 

408 grade: Quality grade filter (all, A+, A, B+, B, C) 

409 language: Language filter (all, en, ja, es, etc.) 

410 activity: Activity level filter (all, active, dormant) 

411 age: Channel age filter (all, new, established, veteran) 

412 country: Country filter (all, or country code) 

413 page: Optional page number for pagination 

414 per_page: Optional items per page for pagination 

415 

416 Returns: 

417 URL string for /creators with all parameters encoded 

418 

419 Examples: 

420 _build_filter_url(sort='subscribers', search='', grade='A+') 

421 → '/creators?sort=subscribers&search=&grade=A%2B&language=all&...' 

422 

423 _build_filter_url(sort='subscribers', search='', page=2, per_page=20) 

424 → '/creators?sort=subscribers&search=&page=2&per_page=20&...' 

425 """ 

426 params = { 

427 "sort": sort, 

428 "search": search, 

429 "grade": grade, 

430 "language": language, 

431 "activity": activity, 

432 "age": age, 

433 "country": country, 

434 "category": category, 

435 } 

436 

437 if page is not None: 437 ↛ 438line 437 didn't jump to line 438 because the condition on line 437 was never true

438 params["page"] = str(page) 

439 if per_page is not None: 

440 params["per_page"] = str(per_page) 

441 

442 return f"/creators?{urlencode(params)}" 

443 

444 

445# ============================================================================ 

446# ADD CREATOR SECTION 

447# ============================================================================ 

448 

449 

450def render_add_creator_section() -> Div: 

451 """ 

452 HTMX form that lets authenticated users submit a creator by @handle or 

453 channel ID. No YouTube API is called on the Vercel frontend — the input 

454 is passed directly to the backend worker queue via ``POST /creators/request``. 

455 """ 

456 return Div( 

457 Div( 

458 Div( 

459 UkIcon("plus-circle", cls="size-5 text-primary shrink-0 mt-0.5"), 

460 Div( 

461 H3("Submit a Creator", cls="text-base font-semibold text-foreground"), 

462 P( 

463 "Know a channel that's not listed? Submit their @handle or " 

464 "channel ID and our system will add them automatically.", 

465 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-0.5", 

466 ), 

467 cls="flex-1 min-w-0", 

468 ), 

469 cls="flex items-start gap-3", 

470 ), 

471 # Input + submit (HTMX inline form) 

472 Form( 

473 Div( 

474 Input( 

475 type="text", 

476 name="q", 

477 id="creator-add-input", 

478 placeholder="@MrBeast or UCX6OQ3DkcsbYNE6H8uQQuVA", 

479 autocomplete="off", 

480 cls="flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm rounded-lg border border-border " 

481 "bg-background focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/40", 

482 ), 

483 Button( 

484 UkIcon("send", cls="size-4 mr-1.5"), 

485 "Submit", 

486 type="submit", 

487 cls="flex items-center px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg " 

488 "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 " 

489 "transition-colors shrink-0", 

490 ), 

491 cls="flex gap-2 mt-3", 

492 ), 

493 # Response target injected below the form 

494 Div(id="creator-add-result", cls="mt-3"), 

495 hx_post="/creators/request", 

496 hx_target="#creator-add-result", 

497 hx_swap="innerHTML", 

498 ), 

499 cls="p-4 rounded-xl border border-border bg-background", 

500 ), 

501 cls="mt-6 mb-2", 

502 ) 

503 

504 

505def render_add_creator_result( 

506 success: bool, 

507 message: str, 

508 creator_id: str = "", 

509 input_query: str = "", 

510) -> Div: 

511 """ 

512 HTMX partial returned by POST /creators/request. 

513 Renders a success or error notice inline below the submit form. 

514 

515 When ``success=True`` and ``input_query`` is provided, an HTMX poll is 

516 attached so the card auto-updates to a profile link once the worker 

517 completes (without requiring a full page reload). 

518 """ 

519 if success: 

520 poll_attrs = {} 

521 if input_query: 521 ↛ 529line 521 didn't jump to line 529 because the condition on line 521 was always true

522 status_url = f"/creators/add-status?{urlencode({'q': input_query})}" 

523 poll_attrs = dict( 

524 hx_get=status_url, 

525 hx_trigger="load, every 3s", 

526 hx_target="this", 

527 hx_swap="outerHTML", 

528 ) 

529 return Div( 

530 UkIcon("check-circle", cls="size-4 text-green-600 shrink-0"), 

531 Div( 

532 P( 

533 "Request queued!", 

534 cls="text-sm font-semibold text-green-700 dark:text-green-400", 

535 ), 

536 P(message, cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"), 

537 cls="flex-1", 

538 ), 

539 cls="flex items-start gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-950/30 " 

540 "border border-green-200 dark:border-green-800", 

541 **poll_attrs, 

542 ) 

543 

544 # creator_id is non-empty when the creator already exists in the DB 

545 if creator_id: 

546 return Div( 

547 UkIcon("info", cls="size-4 text-blue-600 shrink-0"), 

548 Div( 

549 P( 

550 "Already in the database", 

551 cls="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-400", 

552 ), 

553 A( 

554 "View their profile →", 

555 href=f"/creator/{creator_id}", 

556 cls="text-xs text-primary hover:underline", 

557 ), 

558 cls="flex-1", 

559 ), 

560 cls="flex items-start gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/30 " 

561 "border border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-800", 

562 ) 

563 

564 return Div( 

565 UkIcon("alert-circle", cls="size-4 text-red-600 shrink-0"), 

566 P(message, cls="text-sm text-red-700 dark:text-red-400 flex-1"), 

567 cls="flex items-start gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/30 " 

568 "border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800", 

569 ) 

570 

571 

572def render_add_creator_status_result( 

573 status: str, 

574 creator_id: str = "", 

575 input_query: str = "", 

576) -> Div: 

577 """ 

578 HTMX partial returned by GET /creators/add-status. 

579 

580 ``status`` values: 

581 - ``"processing"`` — still in progress; card re-polls every 3 s. 

582 - ``"completed"`` — creator is ready; renders a "View profile →" link. 

583 - ``"failed"`` — worker could not resolve the creator. 

584 """ 

585 if status == "completed" and creator_id: 

586 return Div( 

587 UkIcon("check-circle", cls="size-4 text-green-600 shrink-0"), 

588 Div( 

589 P( 

590 "Creator added!", 

591 cls="text-sm font-semibold text-green-700 dark:text-green-400", 

592 ), 

593 A( 

594 "View their profile →", 

595 href=f"/creator/{creator_id}", 

596 cls="text-xs text-primary hover:underline", 

597 ), 

598 cls="flex-1", 

599 ), 

600 cls="flex items-start gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-950/30 " 

601 "border border-green-200 dark:border-green-800", 

602 ) 

603 

604 if status == "failed": 

605 return Div( 

606 UkIcon("alert-circle", cls="size-4 text-red-600 shrink-0"), 

607 P( 

608 "We couldn't find that creator. Please check the @handle or channel ID and try again.", 

609 cls="text-sm text-red-700 dark:text-red-400 flex-1", 

610 ), 

611 cls="flex items-start gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/30 " 

612 "border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800", 

613 ) 

614 

615 # Processing without a query to poll is unrecoverable — render as failed. 

616 if not input_query: 616 ↛ 617line 616 didn't jump to line 617 because the condition on line 616 was never true

617 return Div( 

618 UkIcon("alert-circle", cls="size-4 text-red-600 shrink-0"), 

619 P( 

620 "We couldn't find that creator. Please check the @handle or channel ID and try again.", 

621 cls="text-sm text-red-700 dark:text-red-400 flex-1", 

622 ), 

623 cls="flex items-start gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/30 " 

624 "border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800", 

625 ) 

626 

627 # Still processing — continue polling 

628 status_url = f"/creators/add-status?{urlencode({'q': input_query})}" 

629 poll_attrs = dict( 

630 hx_get=status_url, 

631 hx_trigger="every 3s", 

632 hx_target="this", 

633 hx_swap="outerHTML", 

634 ) 

635 return Div( 

636 Div( 

637 cls="size-4 rounded-full border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent animate-spin shrink-0" 

638 ), 

639 P( 

640 "Processing… this usually takes under a minute.", 

641 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground flex-1", 

642 ), 

643 cls="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted/40 border border-border", 

644 **poll_attrs, 

645 ) 

646 

647 

648# ============================================================================ 

649# FAVOURITE BUTTON COMPONENT 

650# ============================================================================ 

651 

652 

653def render_favourite_button(creator_id: str, is_favourited: bool = False) -> Div: 

654 """ 

655 Heart-shaped toggle button for marking a creator as a favourite. 

656 

657 The button posts to ``POST /creator/{creator_id}/favourite`` via HTMX and 

658 swaps itself in-place when the server responds with the updated fragment. 

659 

660 Args: 

661 creator_id: UUID of the creator (used in the HTMX target URL). 

662 is_favourited: Current state — True renders a filled/red heart, 

663 False renders an outlined/grey heart. 

664 

665 The wrapping ``div`` carries the ``id="fav-btn-{creator_id}"`` HTMX swap 

666 target and is ``inline-flex`` so it does not disrupt flex-row siblings. 

667 """ 

668 if is_favourited: 

669 icon_cls = "w-4 h-4 fill-red-500 text-red-500" 

670 btn_cls = ( 

671 "inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 " 

672 "bg-red-50 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-200 text-red-600 " 

673 "text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg transition-colors" 

674 ) 

675 label = "Saved" 

676 aria_label = "Remove from favourites" 

677 else: 

678 icon_cls = "w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500" 

679 btn_cls = ( 

680 "inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 " 

681 "bg-accent hover:bg-red-50 border border-gray-200 hover:border-red-200 " 

682 "text-foreground text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg transition-colors" 

683 ) 

684 label = "Save" 

685 aria_label = "Add to favourites" 

686 

687 return Div( 

688 Button( 

689 UkIcon("heart", cls=icon_cls), 

690 Span(label), # always visible — consistent with sibling YouTube and Back buttons 

691 hx_post=f"/creator/{creator_id}/favourite", 

692 hx_target=f"#fav-btn-{creator_id}", 

693 hx_swap="outerHTML", 

694 aria_label=aria_label, 

695 cls=btn_cls, 

696 ), 

697 id=f"fav-btn-{creator_id}", 

698 cls="inline-flex", # size to content — behaves as an inline sibling in flex rows 

699 ) 

700 

701 

702# ============================================================================ 

703# MAIN PAGE FUNCTION 

704# ============================================================================ 

705 

706 

707def render_creators_page( 

708 creators: list[dict], 

709 sort: str = "subscribers", 

710 search: str = "", 

711 grade_filter: str = "all", 

712 language_filter: str = "all", 

713 activity_filter: str = "all", 

714 age_filter: str = "all", 

715 country_filter: str = "all", 

716 category_filter: str = "all", 

717 stats: dict = None, 

718 page: int = 1, 

719 per_page: int = 50, 

720 total_count: int = 0, 

721 total_pages: int = 1, 

722 is_authenticated: bool = False, 

723 favourite_ids: set[str] | None = None, 

724) -> Div: 

725 """ 

726 Analytics-first creator discovery dashboard. 

727 Optimized for what creators care about: growth, revenue, engagement. 

728 Args: 

729 creators: List of creator dicts with stats and ranking 

730 sort: Sort criteria (subscribers, views, videos, engagement, quality) 

731 search: Search query for filtering by name 

732 grade_filter: Quality grade filter (all, A+, A, B+, B, C) 

733 stats: Aggregate statistics dict from backend 

734 """ 

735 # Grade counts for the filter modal badge ("X creators available"). 

736 # Computed from the current page — a full-DB per-grade count would require 

737 # an extra query. Acceptable approximation for the badge display. 

738 grade_counts = _count_by_grade(creators) 

739 

740 # NOTE: _filter_valid_creators is intentionally NOT called here. 

741 # db.get_creators() already applies the same conditions: 

742 # channel_name IS NOT NULL, current_subscribers > 0, sync_status = "synced" 

743 # Applying a second filter on the paginated list would silently reduce the page 

744 # size while total_count (used for pagination math) stays based on the DB count, 

745 # making some pages appear to have fewer results than expected. 

746 

747 # Use provided stats or build them from the current page + RPC global counts. 

748 # Must use the merge pattern so distribution keys (top_countries, top_languages, 

749 # grade_counts, etc.) are always present — get_creator_hero_stats() alone only 

750 # returns the 5 numeric hero keys and would leave _render_filter_bar with nothing. 

751 if stats is None: 751 ↛ 752line 751 didn't jump to line 752 because the condition on line 751 was never true

752 page_stats = calculate_creator_stats(creators) 

753 hero_stats = get_creator_hero_stats() 

754 stats = {**page_stats, **hero_stats} 

755 

756 # Check if any filters are active 

757 has_active_filters = ( 

758 search 

759 or grade_filter != "all" 

760 or language_filter != "all" 

761 or activity_filter != "all" 

762 or age_filter != "all" 

763 or country_filter != "all" 

764 or category_filter != "all" 

765 ) 

766 

767 return Container( 

768 # Hero section with real stats from DB 

769 _render_hero( 

770 stats=stats, 

771 # total_count is the exact DB count for the current query (with or without 

772 # filters). Using it instead of len(creators) ensures the hero shows the 

773 # real filtered total ("450 of 500"), not just the current page size ("50"). 

774 filtered_count=total_count, 

775 has_filters=has_active_filters, 

776 ), 

777 # Add creator section — only visible to authenticated users 

778 (render_add_creator_section() if is_authenticated else None), 

779 # Filter controls (sticky bar) 

780 _render_filter_bar( 

781 search=search, 

782 sort=sort, 

783 grade_filter=grade_filter, 

784 language_filter=language_filter, 

785 activity_filter=activity_filter, 

786 age_filter=age_filter, 

787 country_filter=country_filter, 

788 category_filter=category_filter, 

789 grade_counts=grade_counts, 

790 top_countries=stats.get("top_countries", []) if stats else [], 

791 top_categories=stats.get("top_categories", []) if stats else [], 

792 top_languages=stats.get("top_languages", []) if stats else [], 

793 total_count=total_count, 

794 per_page=per_page, 

795 ), 

796 # Creators grid or empty state 

797 ( 

798 Div( 

799 _render_creators_grid(creators, favourite_ids=favourite_ids), 

800 # Pagination controls 

801 _render_pagination( 

802 page=page, 

803 total_pages=total_pages, 

804 search=search, 

805 sort=sort, 

806 grade_filter=grade_filter, 

807 language_filter=language_filter, 

808 activity_filter=activity_filter, 

809 age_filter=age_filter, 

810 country_filter=country_filter, 

811 category_filter=category_filter, 

812 per_page=per_page, 

813 total_count=total_count, 

814 ), 

815 ) 

816 if creators 

817 else _render_empty_state(search, grade_filter, has_active_filters) 

818 ), 

819 cls=ContainerT.xl, 

820 ) 

821 

822 

823def _render_hero(stats: dict, filtered_count: int = 0, has_filters: bool = False) -> Div: 

824 """ 

825 Hero section with marketing-relevant statistics from database. 

826 

827 Smart display: 

828 - No filters: Shows total creators from DB (e.g., "500 creators") 

829 - With filters: Shows filtered count + total (e.g., "45 of 500 creators") 

830 

831 All numbers come from DB state (via stats dict), NOT from filtered results. 

832 Designed for agencies looking to identify collaboration opportunities. 

833 """ 

834 # Extract only the metrics actually used in hero rendering 

835 total_creators = stats.get("total_creators", 0) 

836 total_countries = stats.get("total_countries", 0) 

837 total_languages = stats.get("total_languages", 0) 

838 total_categories = stats.get("total_categories", 0) 

839 top_countries = stats.get("top_countries") or [] 

840 top_languages = stats.get("top_languages") or [] 

841 top_categories = stats.get("top_categories") or [] 

842 

843 return Div( 

844 Div( 

845 P( 

846 "Creator Intelligence", 

847 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest", 

848 ), 

849 P( 

850 "Discover high-performing creators for brand collaborations.", 

851 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1", 

852 ), 

853 cls="mb-5", 

854 ), 

855 # Metric Strip - marketing-focused metrics from DB 

856 Div( 

857 # Total/Filtered creators - smart display based on filter state 

858 Div( 

859 P( 

860 "Filtered Results" if has_filters else "Total Creators", 

861 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider", 

862 ), 

863 H2( 

864 ( 

865 f"{format_number(filtered_count)} of {format_number(total_creators)}" 

866 if has_filters 

867 else format_number(total_creators) 

868 ), 

869 cls="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-1", 

870 ), 

871 P( 

872 "matching filters" if has_filters else "In database", 

873 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1", 

874 ), 

875 cls="text-center", 

876 ), 

877 # Global Reach - Countries with flag showcase 

878 Div( 

879 # Card header links to the full country rankings list 

880 A( 

881 P( 

882 "Global Reach", 

883 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-blue-600 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2", 

884 ), 

885 H2( 

886 f"{format_number(total_countries)} Nations", 

887 cls="text-xl font-bold text-blue-600", 

888 ), 

889 href="/lists?tab=by-country", 

890 cls="block no-underline hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity", 

891 ), 

892 # Top country flags — each links to that country’s ranked creator list 

893 Div( 

894 *( 

895 [ 

896 A( 

897 get_country_flag(country_code) or "🌍", 

898 href=f"/lists/country/{country_code.upper()}", 

899 title=f"{country_code.upper()}: {count} creators", 

900 cls="text-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform inline-block", 

901 ) 

902 for country_code, count in top_countries[:4] 

903 ] 

904 if top_countries 

905 else [Span("🌍", cls="text-2xl")] 

906 ), 

907 cls="flex gap-1 justify-center mt-2", 

908 ), 

909 P( 

910 "worldwide creators", 

911 cls="text-xs text-blue-500 mt-1", 

912 ), 

913 cls="text-center bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/30 rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-900 hover:border-blue-400 hover:shadow-sm transition-all", 

914 ), 

915 # Linguistic Diversity - Languages with emoji showcase 

916 Div( 

917 # Card header links to the creators page (language filter) 

918 A( 

919 P( 

920 "Languages", 

921 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-purple-600 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2", 

922 ), 

923 H2( 

924 format_number(total_languages), 

925 cls="text-xl font-bold text-purple-600", 

926 ), 

927 href="/lists?tab=by-language", 

928 cls="block no-underline hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity", 

929 ), 

930 # Top language emojis — each links to that language’s ranked creator list 

931 Div( 

932 *( 

933 [ 

934 A( 

935 get_language_emoji(lang_code) or "🗣️", 

936 href=f"/lists/language/{lang_code}", 

937 title=f"{get_language_name(lang_code)}: {count} creators", 

938 cls="text-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform inline-block", 

939 ) 

940 for lang_code, count in top_languages 

941 ] 

942 if top_languages 

943 else [Span("🗣️", cls="text-2xl")] 

944 ), 

945 cls="flex gap-1 justify-center mt-2 flex-wrap", 

946 ), 

947 P( 

948 "content languages", 

949 cls="text-xs text-purple-500 mt-1", 

950 ), 

951 cls="text-center bg-purple-50 dark:bg-purple-950/30 rounded-xl p-4 border border-purple-200 dark:border-purple-900 hover:border-purple-400 hover:shadow-sm transition-all", 

952 ), 

953 # Categories — content topic diversity (same source as /lists page) 

954 Div( 

955 # Card header links to the full category rankings list 

956 A( 

957 P( 

958 "Categories", 

959 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-pink-600 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2", 

960 ), 

961 H2( 

962 format_number(total_categories), 

963 cls="text-xl font-bold text-pink-600", 

964 ), 

965 href="/lists?tab=by-category", 

966 cls="block no-underline hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity", 

967 ), 

968 # Top category emojis — each links to that category's ranked creator list 

969 Div( 

970 *( 

971 [ 

972 A( 

973 get_topic_category_emoji(cat_name) or "🏷️", 

974 href=f"/lists/category/{slugify(cat_name)}", 

975 title=f"{cat_name}: {count} creators", 

976 cls="text-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform inline-block", 

977 ) 

978 for cat_name, count in top_categories 

979 ] 

980 if top_categories 

981 else [Span("🏷️", cls="text-2xl")] 

982 ), 

983 cls="flex gap-1 justify-center mt-2 flex-wrap", 

984 ), 

985 P( 

986 "content topics", 

987 cls="text-xs text-pink-500 mt-1", 

988 ), 

989 cls="text-center bg-pink-50 dark:bg-pink-950/30 rounded-xl p-4 border border-pink-200 dark:border-pink-900 hover:border-pink-400 hover:shadow-sm transition-all", 

990 ), 

991 cls="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8 py-8 border-t border-b border-border", 

992 ), 

993 cls="bg-background rounded-lg border border-border p-6 md:p-8 mb-8", 

994 ) 

995 

996 

997# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

998# Filter pill helper — DRYs the 6 near-identical pill sections in _render_filter_bar 

999# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

1000_PILL_BASE = "px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md transition-all inline-block no-underline text-xs font-medium " 

1001_PILL_INACTIVE = "bg-background border border-border hover:bg-accent text-foreground" 

1002 

1003 

1004def _filter_pills( 

1005 options: list[tuple[str, str, str]], 

1006 current_val: str, 

1007 active_cls: str, 

1008 build_url: Callable[[str], str], 

1009) -> Div: 

1010 """Render a row of filter pills. 

1011 

1012 Args: 

1013 options: [(value, label, emoji), ...] 

1014 current_val: currently active value 

1015 active_cls: Tailwind classes for the active state 

1016 build_url: ``(value: str) -> str`` — returns the href for a given filter value 

1017 """ 

1018 return Div( 

1019 *[ 

1020 A( 

1021 f"{emoji} {label}", 

1022 href=build_url(val), 

1023 cls=_PILL_BASE + (active_cls if current_val == val else _PILL_INACTIVE), 

1024 ) 

1025 for val, label, emoji in options 

1026 ], 

1027 cls="flex gap-1.5 flex-wrap", 

1028 ) 

1029 

1030 

1031def _render_filter_bar( 

1032 search: str, 

1033 sort: str, 

1034 grade_filter: str, 

1035 grade_counts: dict, 

1036 language_filter: str = "all", 

1037 activity_filter: str = "all", 

1038 age_filter: str = "all", 

1039 country_filter: str = "all", 

1040 category_filter: str = "all", 

1041 top_countries: list = None, 

1042 top_categories: list = None, 

1043 top_languages: list = None, 

1044 total_count: int = 0, 

1045 per_page: int = 50, 

1046) -> Div: 

1047 """ 

1048 Clean horizontal card-based filter bar. 

1049 

1050 Shows search + sort on top line, then 4 filter cards below. 

1051 All filters visible at once, no accordion clicks needed. 

1052 

1053 Space: ~150px, all filters visible 

1054 Clicks: 0 (vs 1-4 with accordion) 

1055 Design: Modern, card-based, professional 

1056 """ 

1057 

1058 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1059 # 1. SEARCH FORM 

1060 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1061 search_form = Form( 

1062 Input( 

1063 type="search", 

1064 name="search", 

1065 placeholder="Search creators by name or @handle...", 

1066 value=search, 

1067 cls="w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100", 

1068 autofocus=bool(search), 

1069 ), 

1070 Input(type="hidden", name="sort", value=sort), 

1071 Input(type="hidden", name="grade", value=grade_filter), 

1072 Input(type="hidden", name="language", value=language_filter), 

1073 Input(type="hidden", name="activity", value=activity_filter), 

1074 Input(type="hidden", name="age", value=age_filter), 

1075 Input(type="hidden", name="country", value=country_filter), 

1076 Input(type="hidden", name="category", value=category_filter), 

1077 method="GET", 

1078 action="/creators", 

1079 cls="flex-1", 

1080 ) 

1081 

1082 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1083 # 2. SORT DROPDOWN 

1084 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1085 sort_options = [ 

1086 ("subscribers", "📊 Most Subscribers"), 

1087 ("views", "👀 Most Views"), 

1088 ("engagement", "🔥 Best Engagement"), 

1089 ("quality", "⭐ Quality Score"), 

1090 ("recent", "🆕 Recently Updated"), 

1091 ("consistency", "📈 Most Consistent"), 

1092 ("newest_channel", "🎉 Newest Channels"), 

1093 ("oldest_channel", "👑 Oldest Channels"), 

1094 ] 

1095 

1096 sort_form = Form( 

1097 Div( 

1098 Label("Sort:", cls="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground whitespace-nowrap"), 

1099 Select( 

1100 *[Option(label, value=val, selected=(sort == val)) for val, label in sort_options], 

1101 name="sort", 

1102 cls="h-10 px-3 rounded-lg border border-border font-medium", 

1103 onchange="this.form.submit()", 

1104 ), 

1105 cls="flex gap-2 items-center flex-1", 

1106 ), 

1107 Input(type="hidden", name="search", value=search), 

1108 Input(type="hidden", name="grade", value=grade_filter), 

1109 Input(type="hidden", name="language", value=language_filter), 

1110 Input(type="hidden", name="activity", value=activity_filter), 

1111 Input(type="hidden", name="age", value=age_filter), 

1112 Input(type="hidden", name="country", value=country_filter), 

1113 Input(type="hidden", name="category", value=category_filter), 

1114 method="GET", 

1115 action="/creators", 

1116 ) 

1117 

1118 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1119 # 3. QUALITY GRADE PILLS 

1120 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1121 grade_options = [ 

1122 ("all", "All", "🎯"), 

1123 ("A+", "Elite", "👑"), 

1124 ("A", "Star", "⭐"), 

1125 ("B+", "Rising", "📈"), 

1126 ("B", "Good", "💎"), 

1127 ("C", "New", "🔍"), 

1128 ] 

1129 

1130 grade_pills = _filter_pills( 

1131 grade_options, 

1132 grade_filter, 

1133 active_cls="bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-sm", 

1134 build_url=lambda v: _build_filter_url( 

1135 sort=sort, 

1136 search=search, 

1137 grade=v, 

1138 language=language_filter, 

1139 activity=activity_filter, 

1140 age=age_filter, 

1141 country=country_filter, 

1142 category=category_filter, 

1143 ), 

1144 ) 

1145 

1146 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1147 # 4. LANGUAGE FILTER PILLS 

1148 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1149 # Dynamic from RPC — reflects the actual language distribution in the DB. 

1150 # Falls back to popular defaults if the RPC returns nothing. 

1151 _fallback_languages = [ 

1152 ("en", "English", "🇺🇸"), 

1153 ("es", "Español", "🇪🇸"), 

1154 ("ja", "日本語", "🇯🇵"), 

1155 ("ko", "Korean", "🇰🇷"), 

1156 ("zh", "Chinese", "🇨🇳"), 

1157 ] 

1158 language_options = [("all", "All", "🌍")] 

1159 _lang_source = top_languages or [] 

1160 if _lang_source: 1160 ↛ 1161line 1160 didn't jump to line 1161 because the condition on line 1160 was never true

1161 for _lang_code, _lang_count in _lang_source[:7]: 

1162 if not _lang_code: 

1163 continue 

1164 language_options.append( 

1165 ( 

1166 _lang_code, 

1167 get_language_name(_lang_code), 

1168 get_language_emoji(_lang_code), 

1169 ) 

1170 ) 

1171 else: 

1172 language_options.extend(_fallback_languages) 

1173 

1174 language_pills = _filter_pills( 

1175 language_options, 

1176 language_filter, 

1177 active_cls="bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border border-blue-300", 

1178 build_url=lambda v: _build_filter_url( 

1179 sort=sort, 

1180 search=search, 

1181 grade=grade_filter, 

1182 language=v, 

1183 activity=activity_filter, 

1184 age=age_filter, 

1185 country=country_filter, 

1186 category=category_filter, 

1187 per_page=per_page, 

1188 ), 

1189 ) 

1190 

1191 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1192 # 5. ACTIVITY FILTER PILLS 

1193 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1194 activity_options = [ 

1195 ("all", "All", "📊"), 

1196 ("active", "Active (>5/mo)", "🔥"), 

1197 ("dormant", "Dormant (<1/mo)", "⚠️"), 

1198 ] 

1199 

1200 activity_pills = _filter_pills( 

1201 activity_options, 

1202 activity_filter, 

1203 active_cls="bg-green-100 text-green-700 border border-green-300", 

1204 build_url=lambda v: _build_filter_url( 

1205 sort=sort, 

1206 search=search, 

1207 grade=grade_filter, 

1208 language=language_filter, 

1209 activity=v, 

1210 age=age_filter, 

1211 country=country_filter, 

1212 category=category_filter, 

1213 ), 

1214 ) 

1215 

1216 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1217 # 6. CHANNEL AGE FILTER PILLS 

1218 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1219 age_options = [ 

1220 ("all", "All", "📅"), 

1221 ("new", "0–1 yr", "🆕"), 

1222 ("established", "1–10 yrs", "🏆"), 

1223 ("veteran", "10+ yrs", "👑"), 

1224 ] 

1225 

1226 age_pills = _filter_pills( 

1227 age_options, 

1228 age_filter, 

1229 active_cls="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 border border-purple-300", 

1230 build_url=lambda v: _build_filter_url( 

1231 sort=sort, 

1232 search=search, 

1233 grade=grade_filter, 

1234 language=language_filter, 

1235 activity=activity_filter, 

1236 age=v, 

1237 country=country_filter, 

1238 category=category_filter, 

1239 ), 

1240 ) 

1241 

1242 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1243 # 7. COUNTRY FILTER PILLS 

1244 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1245 # Use top countries from stats, default to popular ones if not provided 

1246 if top_countries is None: 1246 ↛ 1247line 1246 didn't jump to line 1247 because the condition on line 1246 was never true

1247 top_countries = [] 

1248 

1249 country_options = [("all", "All", "🌍")] 

1250 

1251 # Add top countries from database stats 

1252 for country_code, count in top_countries[:8] if top_countries else []: 1252 ↛ 1253line 1252 didn't jump to line 1253 because the loop on line 1252 never started

1253 flag = get_country_flag(country_code) or "🏴" 

1254 country_options.append((country_code, f"{flag} {country_code.upper()}", flag)) 

1255 

1256 # Country pills use a custom label format (flag + code only), so built manually 

1257 country_pills = Div( 

1258 *[ 

1259 A( 

1260 label if emoji == "🌍" else f"{emoji} {label.split()[-1]}", 

1261 href=_build_filter_url( 

1262 sort=sort, 

1263 search=search, 

1264 grade=grade_filter, 

1265 language=language_filter, 

1266 activity=activity_filter, 

1267 age=age_filter, 

1268 country=val, 

1269 category=category_filter, 

1270 ), 

1271 cls=_PILL_BASE 

1272 + ( 

1273 "bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 border border-orange-300" 

1274 if country_filter == val 

1275 else _PILL_INACTIVE 

1276 ), 

1277 ) 

1278 for val, label, emoji in country_options 

1279 ], 

1280 cls="flex gap-1.5 flex-wrap", 

1281 ) 

1282 

1283 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1284 # 8. CATEGORY FILTER PILLS (dynamic from DB stats) 

1285 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1286 if top_categories is None: 1286 ↛ 1287line 1286 didn't jump to line 1287 because the condition on line 1286 was never true

1287 top_categories = [] 

1288 

1289 category_options = [("all", "All", "🏷️")] 

1290 for cat_name, _count in top_categories[:9]: 1290 ↛ 1291line 1290 didn't jump to line 1291 because the loop on line 1290 never started

1291 if not cat_name: # Skip None/empty to avoid crashes 

1292 continue 

1293 emoji = get_topic_category_emoji(cat_name) 

1294 # Shorten long Wikipedia-style names for pill display 

1295 short_name = cat_name.split("/")[-1].strip() # "Music" not "https://...Music" 

1296 if not short_name: # Skip if splitting resulted in empty string 

1297 continue 

1298 category_options.append((cat_name, short_name, emoji)) 

1299 

1300 category_pills = _filter_pills( 

1301 category_options, 

1302 category_filter, 

1303 active_cls="bg-pink-100 text-pink-700 border border-pink-300", 

1304 build_url=lambda v: _build_filter_url( 

1305 sort=sort, 

1306 search=search, 

1307 grade=grade_filter, 

1308 language=language_filter, 

1309 activity=activity_filter, 

1310 age=age_filter, 

1311 country=country_filter, 

1312 category=v, 

1313 per_page=per_page, 

1314 ), 

1315 ) 

1316 

1317 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1318 # 9. COUNT ACTIVE FILTERS 

1319 # Includes search so the FAB badge correctly reflects a text-only search. 

1320 # Strip whitespace so " " doesn't inflate the badge when the input is blank. 

1321 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1322 active_filters = bool(search and search.strip()) + sum( 

1323 f != "all" 

1324 for f in ( 

1325 grade_filter, 

1326 language_filter, 

1327 activity_filter, 

1328 age_filter, 

1329 country_filter, 

1330 category_filter, 

1331 ) 

1332 ) 

1333 

1334 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1335 # 10. BUILD FLOATING FILTER BUTTON 

1336 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1337 filter_button = A( 

1338 # Icon and text 

1339 Div( 

1340 # Filter icon (using emoji for consistency) 

1341 Span("🔍", cls="text-xl md:text-2xl", aria_hidden="true"), 

1342 # Keep label available to screen readers on small screens, visible from sm and up 

1343 Span("Filters", cls="text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold sr-only sm:not-sr-only"), 

1344 cls="flex items-center gap-2", 

1345 ), 

1346 # Active count badge (only show if filters are active) 

1347 ( 

1348 Span( 

1349 str(active_filters), 

1350 cls="absolute -top-1 -right-1 md:-top-1.5 md:-right-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold w-4 h-4 md:w-5 md:h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center", 

1351 aria_label=f"{active_filters} active filters", 

1352 ) 

1353 if active_filters > 0 

1354 else None 

1355 ), 

1356 href="#filter-modal", 

1357 uk_toggle=True, 

1358 aria_label="Open filters menu", 

1359 cls="fixed bottom-4 right-4 md:bottom-6 md:right-6 lg:bottom-8 lg:right-8 z-[999] bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 active:bg-purple-800 text-white rounded-full px-4 py-3 md:px-5 md:py-3.5 shadow-2xl hover:shadow-purple-500/50 transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 no-underline", 

1360 ) 

1361 

1362 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1363 # 11. BUILD FILTER MODAL WITH ACCORDION 

1364 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1365 

1366 # Reset filters link 

1367 reset_link = ( 

1368 A( 

1369 "Reset All Filters", 

1370 href=_build_filter_url( 

1371 sort=sort, 

1372 search=search, 

1373 grade="all", 

1374 language="all", 

1375 activity="all", 

1376 age="all", 

1377 country="all", 

1378 category="all", 

1379 ), 

1380 cls="text-sm font-medium text-purple-600 hover:text-purple-700 hover:underline", 

1381 ) 

1382 if active_filters > 0 

1383 else None 

1384 ) 

1385 

1386 filter_modal = Div( 

1387 Div( 

1388 Div( 

1389 # Header 

1390 Div( 

1391 Div( 

1392 H3( 

1393 "Filter Creators", 

1394 cls="text-xl font-bold text-foreground mb-1", 

1395 ), 

1396 P( 

1397 ( 

1398 f"{total_count:,} creators" 

1399 if total_count 

1400 else f"{grade_counts.get('all', 0)} on this page" 

1401 ), 

1402 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground", 

1403 ), 

1404 cls="flex-1", 

1405 ), 

1406 # Close button 

1407 Button( 

1408 Span("✕", cls="text-xl"), 

1409 cls="uk-modal-close-default p-2 hover:bg-accent rounded-lg transition-colors", 

1410 type="button", 

1411 ), 

1412 cls="flex items-start justify-between mb-4 pb-4 border-b border-border", 

1413 ), 

1414 # Reset link 

1415 ( 

1416 Div( 

1417 reset_link, 

1418 cls="mb-4", 

1419 ) 

1420 if reset_link 

1421 else None 

1422 ), 

1423 # Accordion with filters 

1424 Accordion( 

1425 AccordionItem( 

1426 "Quality Grade", 

1427 grade_pills, 

1428 open=(grade_filter != "all"), 

1429 ), 

1430 AccordionItem( 

1431 "Category", 

1432 category_pills, 

1433 open=(category_filter != "all"), 

1434 ), 

1435 AccordionItem( 

1436 "Language", 

1437 language_pills, 

1438 open=(language_filter != "all"), 

1439 ), 

1440 AccordionItem( 

1441 "Country", 

1442 country_pills, 

1443 open=(country_filter != "all"), 

1444 ), 

1445 AccordionItem( 

1446 "Activity Level", 

1447 activity_pills, 

1448 open=(activity_filter != "all"), 

1449 ), 

1450 AccordionItem( 

1451 "Channel Age", 

1452 age_pills, 

1453 open=(age_filter != "all"), 

1454 ), 

1455 multiple=True, 

1456 collapsible=True, 

1457 cls="space-y-2", 

1458 ), 

1459 cls="uk-modal-body bg-background rounded-t-3xl md:rounded-2xl p-6 max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto", 

1460 ), 

1461 cls="uk-modal-dialog uk-margin-auto-vertical", 

1462 ), 

1463 id="filter-modal", 

1464 uk_modal="bg-close: true; esc-close: true;", 

1465 cls="uk-modal", 

1466 ) 

1467 

1468 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1469 # 12. RETURN CLEAN TOP BAR + FLOATING BUTTON + MODAL 

1470 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

1471 return Div( 

1472 # Compact top bar: Search + Sort only 

1473 Div( 

1474 search_form, 

1475 sort_form, 

1476 cls="flex gap-3", 

1477 ), 

1478 # Floating filter button (fixed position) 

1479 filter_button, 

1480 # Filter modal (hidden until toggled) 

1481 filter_modal, 

1482 cls="sticky top-0 bg-background border-b border-border p-4 shadow-sm z-30", 

1483 ) 

1484 

1485 

1486def _render_creators_grid(creators: list[dict], favourite_ids: set[str] | None = None) -> Div: 

1487 """Grid of creator cards with strict row-based layout.""" 

1488 _favs = favourite_ids or set() 

1489 return Div( 

1490 *[ 

1491 _render_creator_card(creator, is_favourited=safe_get_value(creator, "id", "") in _favs) 

1492 for creator in creators 

1493 ], 

1494 cls="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5", 

1495 ) 

1496 

1497 

1498# ============================================================================= 

1499# CREATOR CARD SECTION BUILDERS 

1500# ============================================================================= 

1501 

1502 

1503def _build_card_header( 

1504 thumbnail_url: str, 

1505 channel_name: str, 

1506 channel_url: str, 

1507 custom_url: str, 

1508 current_subs: int, 

1509 current_videos: int, 

1510 rank: str, 

1511 grade_icon: str, 

1512 grade_label: str, 

1513 grade_bg: str, 

1514 quality_grade: str, 

1515 channel_age_days: int, 

1516) -> Div: 

1517 """Build card header: award-showcase rank badge, avatar, name, grade pill. 

1518 

1519 No nested <a> tags — the whole card is already wrapped in an <a> by the 

1520 caller, so channel_name is plain H3 text. The YouTube link lives only in 

1521 the footer as a <button onclick> to avoid invalid HTML nesting. 

1522 """ 

1523 # Normalize custom URL to handle both "@" and non-"@" formats, but display with "@" for familiarity 

1524 handle_display = f"@{custom_url.lstrip('@')}" if custom_url else None 

1525 

1526 # Award-style rank colouring: gold top-3, silver top-10, neutral otherwise 

1527 try: 

1528 rank_int = int(rank) 

1529 except (ValueError, TypeError): 

1530 rank_int = 999 

1531 rank_cls = ( 

1532 "bg-amber-400 text-amber-900" 

1533 if rank_int <= 3 

1534 else ( 

1535 "bg-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-600 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200" 

1536 if rank_int <= 10 

1537 else "bg-accent text-muted-foreground border border-border" 

1538 ) 

1539 ) 

1540 

1541 return Div( 

1542 # Avatar with rank badge anchored to its bottom-left corner 

1543 Div( 

1544 Img( 

1545 src=thumbnail_url, 

1546 alt=channel_name, 

1547 cls="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl object-cover ring-2 ring-border", 

1548 ), 

1549 Div( 

1550 f"#{rank}", 

1551 cls=f"absolute -bottom-2 -left-2 {rank_cls} text-xs font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md shadow-sm whitespace-nowrap", 

1552 ), 

1553 cls="relative shrink-0", 

1554 ), 

1555 # Channel name + handle + quick stats — plain text, no nested <a> 

1556 Div( 

1557 H3( 

1558 channel_name, 

1559 cls="font-bold text-base text-foreground leading-tight truncate group-hover:text-primary transition-colors", 

1560 ), 

1561 ( 

1562 P(handle_display, cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate mt-0.5") 

1563 if handle_display 

1564 else None 

1565 ), 

1566 P( 

1567 f"{format_number(current_subs)} subs · {current_videos} videos", 

1568 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate mt-0.5", 

1569 ), 

1570 cls="flex-1 min-w-0", 

1571 ), 

1572 # Grade pill — omitted for grade C (unscored/new channels) 

1573 ( 

1574 Div( 

1575 Span(grade_icon, cls="text-base leading-none"), 

1576 Span(grade_label, cls="text-xs font-semibold leading-none"), 

1577 cls=f"flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg {grade_bg} shrink-0", 

1578 ) 

1579 if quality_grade and quality_grade != "C" 

1580 else None 

1581 ), 

1582 cls="flex items-start gap-3", 

1583 ) 

1584 

1585 

1586def _build_primary_metrics( 

1587 current_subs: int, subs_change: int, current_views: int, views_change: int 

1588) -> Div: 

1589 """Build primary metrics section (subscribers and views).""" 

1590 return Div( 

1591 # Subscribers 

1592 Div( 

1593 P( 

1594 "SUBSCRIBERS", 

1595 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide", 

1596 ), 

1597 H2( 

1598 format_number(current_subs), 

1599 cls="text-3xl font-bold text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 mt-1", 

1600 ), 

1601 P( 

1602 ( 

1603 f"{'+' if subs_change > 0 else ''}{format_number(subs_change)} (30d)" 

1604 if subs_change is not None 

1605 else "—" 

1606 ), 

1607 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1", 

1608 ), 

1609 cls="bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 rounded-lg p-3 text-center", 

1610 ), 

1611 # Views 

1612 Div( 

1613 P( 

1614 "VIEWS", 

1615 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide", 

1616 ), 

1617 H2( 

1618 format_number(current_views), 

1619 cls="text-3xl font-bold text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400 mt-1", 

1620 ), 

1621 P( 

1622 ( 

1623 f"{'+' if views_change > 0 else ''}{format_number(views_change)} (30d)" 

1624 if views_change is not None 

1625 else "—" 

1626 ), 

1627 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1", 

1628 ), 

1629 cls="bg-purple-50 dark:bg-purple-900/20 rounded-lg p-3 text-center", 

1630 ), 

1631 cls="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-4", 

1632 ) 

1633 

1634 

1635def _build_performance_metrics( 

1636 avg_views_per_video: int, 

1637 current_videos: int, 

1638 estimated_revenue: int, 

1639 views_per_sub: float, 

1640) -> Div: 

1641 """Build performance metrics grid.""" 

1642 return Div( 

1643 Div( 

1644 P( 

1645 "AVG VIEWS", 

1646 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase", 

1647 ), 

1648 P( 

1649 format_number(avg_views_per_video), 

1650 cls="text-lg font-bold text-foreground mt-1", 

1651 ), 

1652 P("per video", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground"), 

1653 cls="bg-accent rounded-lg p-3 text-center", 

1654 ), 

1655 Div( 

1656 P( 

1657 "VIDEOS", 

1658 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase", 

1659 ), 

1660 P( 

1661 format_number(current_videos), 

1662 cls="text-lg font-bold text-foreground mt-1", 

1663 ), 

1664 P("published", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground"), 

1665 cls="bg-accent rounded-lg p-3 text-center", 

1666 ), 

1667 Div( 

1668 P( 

1669 "VIEWS/SUB", 

1670 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-indigo-700 dark:text-indigo-400 uppercase", 

1671 ), 

1672 P( 

1673 f"{views_per_sub:.1f}x", 

1674 cls="text-lg font-bold text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-400 mt-1", 

1675 ), 

1676 P("audience reach", cls="text-xs text-indigo-500 dark:text-indigo-400"), 

1677 cls="bg-indigo-50 dark:bg-indigo-900/20 rounded-lg p-3 text-center", 

1678 ), 

1679 Div( 

1680 P( 

1681 "EST. REVENUE", 

1682 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-green-700 dark:text-green-400 uppercase", 

1683 ), 

1684 P( 

1685 f"${format_number(estimated_revenue)}", 

1686 cls="text-lg font-bold text-green-600 dark:text-green-400 mt-1", 

1687 ), 

1688 P("/month est.", cls="text-xs text-green-600 dark:text-green-400"), 

1689 cls="bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-900/20 rounded-lg p-3 text-center", 

1690 ), 

1691 cls="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-4", 

1692 ) 

1693 

1694 

1695def _build_growth_trend( 

1696 growth_rate: float, 

1697 growth_label: str, 

1698 growth_style: str, 

1699 subs_change: int | None = None, 

1700) -> Div: 

1701 """ 

1702 Build growth trend indicator section. 

1703 

1704 Handles three states: 

1705 1. Valid growth data: Shows percentage, label, and bar 

1706 2. Tracking in progress (NULL/None): Shows "tracking" badge 

1707 3. Zero growth with valid baseline: Shows 0% (legitimate) 

1708 """ 

1709 # Check if growth data is available (not None/NULL from DB) 

1710 has_growth_data = subs_change is not None 

1711 

1712 if not has_growth_data: 1712 ↛ 1713line 1712 didn't jump to line 1713 because the condition on line 1712 was never true

1713 return Div( 

1714 Div( 

1715 P( 

1716 "GROWTH TRACKING", 

1717 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground", 

1718 ), 

1719 Div( 

1720 Span("📊", cls="text-2xl"), 

1721 Span( 

1722 "Initializing...", 

1723 cls="px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 border border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-800", 

1724 ), 

1725 cls="flex items-center gap-3", 

1726 ), 

1727 P( 

1728 "Growth metrics available in 7+ days", 

1729 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2", 

1730 ), 

1731 cls="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2", 

1732 ), 

1733 cls="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 dark:from-blue-900/10 to-indigo-50 dark:to-indigo-900/10 rounded-lg p-4 mb-4 border border-blue-100 dark:border-blue-900/30", 

1734 ) 

1735 

1736 # Has valid growth data - show normal growth bar 

1737 return Div( 

1738 Div( 

1739 P( 

1740 "30-DAY TREND", 

1741 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground", 

1742 ), 

1743 Div( 

1744 P( 

1745 f"{growth_rate:+.1f}%", 

1746 cls="text-sm font-bold text-foreground", 

1747 ), 

1748 Span( 

1749 growth_label, 

1750 cls=f"px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border {growth_style}", 

1751 ), 

1752 cls="flex items-center gap-2", 

1753 ), 

1754 cls="flex justify-between items-center mb-3", 

1755 ), 

1756 # Growth bar 

1757 Div( 

1758 Div( 

1759 cls=( 

1760 "h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full" 

1761 if growth_rate >= 0 

1762 else "h-2 bg-red-500 rounded-full" 

1763 ), 

1764 style=f"width: {min(100, max(0, abs(growth_rate) * 5))}%", 

1765 ), 

1766 cls="w-full h-2 bg-border rounded-full overflow-hidden", 

1767 ), 

1768 cls=( 

1769 "bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-900/20 rounded-lg p-3 mb-4" 

1770 if growth_rate >= 0 

1771 else "bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 rounded-lg p-3 mb-4" 

1772 ), 

1773 ) 

1774 

1775 

1776def _render_topic_categories(topic_categories: str | None) -> Div | None: 

1777 """ 

1778 Render topic categories as clean emoji-only pills. 

1779 

1780 Args: 

1781 topic_categories: Comma-separated category names from DB 

1782 (e.g., "Music,Entertainment,Video game culture") 

1783 

1784 Returns: 

1785 Div with minimal emoji pills, or None if no categories 

1786 

1787 Design: Ultra-clean emoji-only badges with subtle colors. 

1788 Full category name appears on hover with Wikipedia link. 

1789 Reduces visual overload while maintaining context. 

1790 """ 

1791 if not topic_categories: 1791 ↛ 1795line 1791 didn't jump to line 1795 because the condition on line 1791 was always true

1792 return None 

1793 

1794 # Parse categories - may be JSON array or comma-separated string 

1795 raw_categories = [] 

1796 try: 

1797 # Try parsing as JSON first (e.g., '["https://...", "https://..."]') 

1798 parsed = json.loads(topic_categories) 

1799 if isinstance(parsed, list): 

1800 raw_categories = [str(item).strip() for item in parsed if item] 

1801 else: 

1802 raw_categories = [str(parsed).strip()] 

1803 except (json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError): 

1804 # Fallback to comma-separated string 

1805 raw_categories = [cat.strip() for cat in str(topic_categories).split(",") if cat.strip()] 

1806 

1807 if not raw_categories: 

1808 return None 

1809 

1810 # Extract category names from Wikipedia URLs 

1811 categories = [] 

1812 for item in raw_categories: 

1813 # If it's a Wikipedia URL, extract the category name from the slug 

1814 if "wikipedia.org/wiki/" in item: 

1815 try: 

1816 # Extract everything after the last /wiki/ 

1817 slug = item.split("/wiki/")[-1].rstrip("/") 

1818 # Decode URL encoding and convert underscores to spaces 

1819 name = unquote(slug).replace("_", " ") 

1820 if name: 

1821 categories.append(name) 

1822 except Exception: 

1823 continue 

1824 else: 

1825 # It's already a category name 

1826 clean_name = item.strip("\"'[]").strip() 

1827 if clean_name: 

1828 categories.append(clean_name) 

1829 

1830 if not categories: 

1831 return None 

1832 

1833 # Color palette for pills (subtle, professional) 

1834 pill_colors = [ 

1835 "bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 hover:bg-blue-200 dark:hover:bg-blue-800/60", 

1836 "bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/40 hover:bg-purple-200 dark:hover:bg-purple-800/60", 

1837 "bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900/40 hover:bg-green-200 dark:hover:bg-green-800/60", 

1838 "bg-pink-100 dark:bg-pink-900/40 hover:bg-pink-200 dark:hover:bg-pink-800/60", 

1839 "bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-900/40 hover:bg-indigo-200 dark:hover:bg-indigo-800/60", 

1840 ] 

1841 

1842 # Build emoji-only pills (limit to 5 for clean display) 

1843 category_pills = [] 

1844 for idx, cat in enumerate(categories[:5]): 

1845 emoji = get_topic_category_emoji(cat) 

1846 # Create clean Wikipedia URL from category name (URL-encoded for special characters) 

1847 wiki_slug = quote(cat.replace(" ", "_")) 

1848 wiki_url = f"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/{wiki_slug}" 

1849 color = pill_colors[idx % len(pill_colors)] 

1850 

1851 category_pills.append( 

1852 A( 

1853 emoji, 

1854 href=wiki_url, 

1855 target="_blank", 

1856 rel="noopener noreferrer", 

1857 cls=f"inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full {color} text-base transition-all duration-200 no-underline hover:scale-110", 

1858 title=f"{cat} (click to learn more)", 

1859 ) 

1860 ) 

1861 

1862 return Div( 

1863 *category_pills, 

1864 cls="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 px-3 mb-3", 

1865 ) 

1866 

1867 

1868def _render_bio(bio: str | None, max_chars: int = 130) -> P | None: 

1869 """Render a truncated bio paragraph, or None if no bio is available.""" 

1870 if not bio: 1870 ↛ 1872line 1870 didn't jump to line 1872 because the condition on line 1870 was always true

1871 return None 

1872 text = bio[:max_chars].rstrip() + "…" if len(bio) > max_chars else bio 

1873 return P( 

1874 text, 

1875 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4 line-clamp-2", 

1876 ) 

1877 

1878 

1879def _build_card_footer( 

1880 last_updated: str, channel_url: str, creator_id: str = "", is_favourited: bool = False 

1881) -> Div: 

1882 """Card footer: last-updated timestamp + optional heart + YouTube link. 

1883 

1884 The YouTube link and favourite heart are <button> elements rather than <a> 

1885 because the whole card is already wrapped in an <a> (profile link). 

1886 Nested <a> tags are invalid HTML and cause browsers to silently drop the 

1887 inner link. Both buttons call event.stopPropagation() to prevent the card 

1888 click from also triggering the outer link. 

1889 """ 

1890 # json.dumps produces a fully JS-safe quoted string (handles backslashes, 

1891 # newlines, and all special chars), not just single-quote substitution. 

1892 js_url = json.dumps(channel_url) # e.g. '"https://youtube.com/..."' 

1893 

1894 # Heart button — only rendered when creator_id is available 

1895 if creator_id: 1895 ↛ 1913line 1895 didn't jump to line 1913 because the condition on line 1895 was always true

1896 heart_cls = "w-3.5 h-3.5" + ( 

1897 " fill-red-500 text-red-500" if is_favourited else " text-gray-400" 

1898 ) 

1899 heart_btn = Div( 

1900 Button( 

1901 UkIcon("heart", cls=heart_cls), 

1902 hx_post=f"/creator/{creator_id}/favourite", 

1903 hx_target=f"#fav-btn-{creator_id}", 

1904 hx_swap="outerHTML", 

1905 type="button", 

1906 onclick="event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault();", 

1907 aria_label="Toggle favourite", 

1908 cls="flex items-center text-xs font-semibold text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 dark:text-gray-500 dark:hover:text-red-400 transition-colors bg-transparent border-0 p-0 cursor-pointer", 

1909 ), 

1910 id=f"fav-btn-{creator_id}", 

1911 ) 

1912 else: 

1913 heart_btn = None 

1914 

1915 return Div( 

1916 Div( 

1917 UkIcon("clock", cls="w-3 h-3 mr-1 opacity-50"), 

1918 Span( 

1919 format_date_relative(last_updated), 

1920 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground", 

1921 ), 

1922 cls="flex items-center gap-0.5", 

1923 ), 

1924 Div( 

1925 heart_btn, 

1926 # <button> stops the card-level click; JS opens YouTube in a new tab 

1927 Button( 

1928 UkIcon("youtube", cls="w-3.5 h-3.5 mr-1"), 

1929 "YouTube", 

1930 type="button", 

1931 onclick=f"event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); window.open({js_url}, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer')", 

1932 cls="flex items-center text-xs font-semibold text-red-500 hover:text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 dark:hover:text-red-300 transition-colors bg-transparent border-0 p-0 cursor-pointer", 

1933 ), 

1934 cls="flex items-center gap-3", 

1935 ), 

1936 cls="flex justify-between items-center mt-auto pt-3 border-t border-border", 

1937 ) 

1938 

1939 

1940def _build_info_strip( 

1941 language: str, 

1942 country_code: str, 

1943 channel_age_days: int, 

1944 monthly_uploads: float, 

1945 custom_url: str = "", 

1946) -> Div | None: 

1947 """Build clean emoji/icon strip showing key channel info.""" 

1948 # Build icon list 

1949 icons = [] 

1950 

1951 # Country flag 

1952 country_flag = get_country_flag(country_code) 

1953 if country_flag: 1953 ↛ 1954line 1953 didn't jump to line 1954 because the condition on line 1953 was never true

1954 icons.append( 

1955 Span( 

1956 country_flag, 

1957 title=f"Country: {country_code.upper()}", 

1958 cls="text-lg", 

1959 ) 

1960 ) 

1961 

1962 # Language 

1963 if language: 1963 ↛ 1964line 1963 didn't jump to line 1964 because the condition on line 1963 was never true

1964 icons.append( 

1965 Span( 

1966 get_language_emoji(language), 

1967 title=f"Language: {get_language_name(language)}", 

1968 cls="text-lg", 

1969 ) 

1970 ) 

1971 

1972 if channel_age_days: 1972 ↛ 1981line 1972 didn't jump to line 1981 because the condition on line 1972 was always true

1973 icons.append( 

1974 Span( 

1975 f"{get_age_emoji(channel_age_days)} {format_channel_age(channel_age_days)}", 

1976 title=f"Channel age: {get_age_title(channel_age_days)}", 

1977 cls="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground", 

1978 ) 

1979 ) 

1980 

1981 activity_badge = get_activity_badge(monthly_uploads) 

1982 if activity_badge: 1982 ↛ 1991line 1982 didn't jump to line 1991 because the condition on line 1982 was always true

1983 icons.append( 

1984 Span( 

1985 activity_badge, 

1986 title=f"Upload frequency: {get_activity_title(monthly_uploads)}", 

1987 cls="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground", 

1988 ) 

1989 ) 

1990 

1991 if not icons: 1991 ↛ 1992line 1991 didn't jump to line 1992 because the condition on line 1991 was never true

1992 return None 

1993 

1994 return Div( 

1995 *icons, 

1996 cls="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-2 bg-accent rounded-lg", 

1997 ) 

1998 

1999 

2000def _render_creator_card(creator: dict, is_favourited: bool = False) -> Div: 

2001 """ 

2002 Creator card - clean, data-driven design. 

2003 

2004 Layout: 

2005 [Thumbnail + Rank] | [Name + Badge] 

2006 ──────────────────────────────────── 

2007 SUBSCRIBERS | VIEWS (large 2-col metrics) 

2008 ──────────────────────────────────── 

2009 AVG/VID | VIDEOS | ENGAGEMENT | REVENUE (small 4-col metrics) 

2010 ──────────────────────────────────── 

2011 30-Day Trend bar 

2012 ──────────────────────────────────── 

2013 Updated · ❤ · Analyze → (footer) 

2014 """ 

2015 

2016 # Extract all data 

2017 channel_id = safe_get_value(creator, "channel_id", "N/A") 

2018 channel_name = safe_get_value(creator, "channel_name", "Unknown") 

2019 # Preserve existing channel_url if present, otherwise construct from channel_id 

2020 channel_url = ( 

2021 safe_get_value(creator, "channel_url") or f"https://youtube.com/channel/{channel_id}" 

2022 ) 

2023 quality_grade = safe_get_value(creator, "quality_grade", "C") 

2024 rank = safe_get_value(creator, "_rank", "—") 

2025 thumbnail_url = ( 

2026 safe_get_value(creator, "channel_thumbnail_url") 

2027 or safe_get_value(creator, "thumbnail_url") 

2028 or "https://via.placeholder.com/64x64?text=No+Image" 

2029 ) 

2030 channel_age_days = safe_get_value(creator, "channel_age_days", 0) 

2031 

2032 # Numeric fields 

2033 current_subs = int(safe_get_value(creator, "current_subscribers", 0) or 0) 

2034 current_views = int(safe_get_value(creator, "current_view_count", 0) or 0) 

2035 current_videos = int(safe_get_value(creator, "current_video_count", 0) or 0) 

2036 # Preserve None for delta fields (growth tracking initializing) 

2037 subs_change_raw = safe_get_value(creator, "subscribers_change_30d", None) 

2038 subs_change = int(subs_change_raw) if subs_change_raw is not None else None 

2039 views_change_raw = safe_get_value(creator, "views_change_30d", None) 

2040 views_change = int(views_change_raw) if views_change_raw is not None else None 

2041 engagement_score = float(safe_get_value(creator, "engagement_score", 0) or 0) 

2042 last_updated = safe_get_value(creator, "last_updated_at", "") 

2043 

2044 # === CALCULATIONS === 

2045 avg_views_per_video = calculate_avg_views_per_video(current_views, current_videos) 

2046 growth_rate = calculate_growth_rate(subs_change, current_subs) 

2047 views_per_sub = calculate_views_per_subscriber(current_views, current_subs) 

2048 

2049 # === STATUS & STYLING === 

2050 sync_status = safe_get_value(creator, "sync_status", "pending") 

2051 sync_badge_info = get_sync_status_badge(sync_status) 

2052 card_border = f"border-l-4 border-amber-400" if sync_status != "synced" else "" 

2053 

2054 grade_icon, grade_label, grade_bg = get_grade_info(quality_grade) 

2055 growth_label, growth_style = get_growth_signal(growth_rate) 

2056 

2057 # === INFO STRIP DATA === 

2058 custom_url = safe_get_value(creator, "custom_url", "") 

2059 language = safe_get_value(creator, "default_language", "") 

2060 country_code = safe_get_value(creator, "country_code", "") 

2061 primary_category = safe_get_value(creator, "primary_category", "general") or "general" 

2062 monthly_uploads = safe_get_value(creator, "monthly_uploads", 0) 

2063 

2064 # v4 revenue model — uses country + niche for accurate CPM, Shorts split, sponsorships 

2065 _rev = estimate_monthly_revenue_v4( 

2066 total_subs=current_subs, 

2067 total_views=current_views, 

2068 video_count=current_videos, 

2069 country_code=country_code or "US", 

2070 niche=primary_category, 

2071 ) 

2072 # Round to the nearest whole dollar instead of truncating to avoid systematic under-reporting 

2073 estimated_revenue = round(_rev["est_monthly_total"]) 

2074 keywords = safe_get_value(creator, "keywords", "") 

2075 

2076 info_strip = _build_info_strip( 

2077 language, country_code, channel_age_days, monthly_uploads, custom_url 

2078 ) 

2079 

2080 # === COMPOSE CARD === 

2081 # Sync status banner — inline at the top of the body (not a MonsterUI header= 

2082 # slot) so it doesn't inherit uk-card-header border/padding styling. 

2083 sync_banner = ( 

2084 Div( 

2085 f"{sync_badge_info[0]} {sync_badge_info[1]}", 

2086 cls=f"text-xs font-semibold text-center py-1 px-3 rounded-md {sync_badge_info[2]}", 

2087 ) 

2088 if sync_badge_info 

2089 else None 

2090 ) 

2091 

2092 # All content goes into the Card body as positional args — including the 

2093 # channel header block. This matches the MonsterUI team-card pattern (ex_card3) 

2094 # where DivLAligned(avatar, info) is the first body child, not a header= slot. 

2095 # Using header= caused uk-card-header to apply its own border/padding, which 

2096 # visually hid the body metric sections. 

2097 card = Card( 

2098 # ── Identity ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

2099 sync_banner, 

2100 _build_card_header( 

2101 thumbnail_url, 

2102 channel_name, 

2103 channel_url, 

2104 custom_url, 

2105 current_subs, 

2106 current_videos, 

2107 rank, 

2108 grade_icon, 

2109 grade_label, 

2110 grade_bg, 

2111 quality_grade, 

2112 channel_age_days, 

2113 ), 

2114 # ── Context ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

2115 # Topic categories rendered as clean emoji pills with Wikipedia links, plus 

2116 _render_topic_categories(safe_get_value(creator, "topic_categories")), 

2117 _render_bio( 

2118 safe_get_value(creator, "bio") or safe_get_value(creator, "channel_description") 

2119 ), 

2120 # ── Metrics ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

2121 _build_primary_metrics(current_subs, subs_change, current_views, views_change), 

2122 # Performance metrics grid: avg views/video, total videos, views/sub, est. revenue 

2123 _build_performance_metrics( 

2124 avg_views_per_video, current_videos, estimated_revenue, views_per_sub 

2125 ), 

2126 # Growth trend (pass subs_change to determine if tracking is initializing) 

2127 _build_growth_trend(growth_rate, growth_label, growth_style, subs_change), 

2128 # Keywords if available, rendered as a single line of small italic text (not a full tag cloud) 

2129 ( 

2130 P( 

2131 keywords, 

2132 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground italic line-clamp-1 text-center", 

2133 ) 

2134 if keywords 

2135 else None 

2136 ), 

2137 # Info strp at bottom of the card body, showing language, country, channel age, and activity badges as emojis with tooltips 

2138 info_strip, 

2139 # ── Footer slot (only the action row — no body content here) ────────── 

2140 footer=_build_card_footer( 

2141 last_updated, 

2142 channel_url, 

2143 creator_id=safe_get_value(creator, "id", ""), 

2144 is_favourited=is_favourited, 

2145 ), 

2146 body_cls="space-y-3", 

2147 cls=( 

2148 CardT.hover, 

2149 f"min-w-0 overflow-hidden w-full cursor-pointer {card_border}", 

2150 ), 

2151 ) 

2152 

2153 # Single outer <a> — the only link wrapping the card. 

2154 # No <a> tags exist inside the card body; the YouTube button uses onclick. 

2155 creator_uuid = safe_get_value(creator, "id", "") 

2156 if not creator_uuid: 2156 ↛ 2157line 2156 didn't jump to line 2157 because the condition on line 2156 was never true

2157 return card 

2158 return A( 

2159 card, 

2160 href=f"/creator/{creator_uuid}?name={quote(channel_name)}", 

2161 cls="block no-underline group min-w-0 w-full", 

2162 ) 

2163 

2164 

2165def _render_pagination( 

2166 page: int, 

2167 total_pages: int, 

2168 search: str, 

2169 sort: str, 

2170 grade_filter: str, 

2171 language_filter: str, 

2172 activity_filter: str, 

2173 age_filter: str, 

2174 country_filter: str, 

2175 category_filter: str, 

2176 per_page: int, 

2177 total_count: int, 

2178) -> Div: 

2179 """ 

2180 Render pagination controls with smart page button display. 

2181 

2182 Pattern inspired by FastHTML best practices: 

2183 - Shows first, last, and current pages 

2184 - Uses ellipsis (...) for skipped ranges 

2185 - Highlights current page 

2186 - Preserves all filter state in URLs 

2187 """ 

2188 if total_pages <= 1: 2188 ↛ 2191line 2188 didn't jump to line 2191 because the condition on line 2188 was always true

2189 return Div() # No pagination needed 

2190 

2191 def page_link(page_num: int, label: str = None, is_current: bool = False): 

2192 """Generate a page link button.""" 

2193 if label is None: 

2194 label = str(page_num) 

2195 

2196 url = _build_filter_url( 

2197 sort=sort, 

2198 search=search, 

2199 grade=grade_filter, 

2200 language=language_filter, 

2201 activity=activity_filter, 

2202 age=age_filter, 

2203 country=country_filter, 

2204 category=category_filter, 

2205 page=page_num, 

2206 per_page=per_page, 

2207 ) 

2208 

2209 if is_current: 

2210 return Span( 

2211 label, 

2212 cls="px-3 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg cursor-default", 

2213 ) 

2214 else: 

2215 return A( 

2216 label, 

2217 href=url, 

2218 cls="px-3 py-2 bg-background border border-border text-foreground font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors no-underline", 

2219 ) 

2220 

2221 def ellipsis(): 

2222 """Render ellipsis for skipped pages.""" 

2223 return Span("...", cls="px-2 text-muted-foreground") 

2224 

2225 # Smart page button display logic (like the FastHTML example) 

2226 buttons = [] 

2227 

2228 if total_pages <= 7: 

2229 # Show all pages if 7 or fewer 

2230 buttons = [page_link(p, is_current=(p == page)) for p in range(1, total_pages + 1)] 

2231 elif page <= 3: 

2232 # Near start: [1] [2] [3] [4] ... [last] 

2233 buttons = [page_link(p, is_current=(p == page)) for p in range(1, 5)] 

2234 buttons.append(ellipsis()) 

2235 buttons.append(page_link(total_pages)) 

2236 elif page >= total_pages - 2: 

2237 # Near end: [1] ... [last-3] [last-2] [last-1] [last] 

2238 buttons.append(page_link(1)) 

2239 buttons.append(ellipsis()) 

2240 buttons.extend( 

2241 [page_link(p, is_current=(p == page)) for p in range(total_pages - 3, total_pages + 1)] 

2242 ) 

2243 else: 

2244 # Middle: [1] ... [current-1] [current] [current+1] ... [last] 

2245 buttons.append(page_link(1)) 

2246 buttons.append(ellipsis()) 

2247 buttons.extend([page_link(p, is_current=(p == page)) for p in range(page - 1, page + 2)]) 

2248 buttons.append(ellipsis()) 

2249 buttons.append(page_link(total_pages)) 

2250 

2251 # Previous/Next buttons 

2252 prev_button = ( 

2253 A( 

2254 "← Previous", 

2255 href=_build_filter_url( 

2256 sort=sort, 

2257 search=search, 

2258 grade=grade_filter, 

2259 language=language_filter, 

2260 activity=activity_filter, 

2261 age=age_filter, 

2262 country=country_filter, 

2263 category=category_filter, 

2264 page=page - 1, 

2265 per_page=per_page, 

2266 ), 

2267 cls="px-4 py-2 bg-background border border-border text-foreground font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors no-underline", 

2268 ) 

2269 if page > 1 

2270 else Span( 

2271 "← Previous", 

2272 cls="px-4 py-2 bg-accent text-muted-foreground font-medium rounded-lg cursor-not-allowed", 

2273 ) 

2274 ) 

2275 

2276 next_button = ( 

2277 A( 

2278 "Next →",
