2279 href=_build_filter_url( 

2280 sort=sort, 

2281 search=search, 

2282 grade=grade_filter, 

2283 language=language_filter, 

2284 activity=activity_filter, 

2285 age=age_filter, 

2286 country=country_filter, 

2287 category=category_filter, 

2288 page=page + 1, 

2289 per_page=per_page, 

2290 ), 

2291 cls="px-4 py-2 bg-background border border-border text-foreground font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors no-underline", 

2292 ) 

2293 if page < total_pages 

2294 else Span( 

2295 "Next →", 

2296 cls="px-4 py-2 bg-accent text-muted-foreground font-medium rounded-lg cursor-not-allowed", 

2297 ) 

2298 ) 

2299 

2300 # Results info 

2301 start_result = (page - 1) * per_page + 1 

2302 end_result = min(page * per_page, total_count) 

2303 

2304 return Div( 

2305 # Results summary 

2306 Div( 

2307 P( 

2308 f"Showing {start_result:,}–{end_result:,} of {total_count:,} creators", 

2309 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground", 

2310 ), 

2311 cls="text-center mb-4", 

2312 ), 

2313 # Pagination controls 

2314 Div( 

2315 prev_button, 

2316 Div(*buttons, cls="flex gap-1"), 

2317 next_button, 

2318 cls="flex items-center justify-center gap-4 flex-wrap", 

2319 ), 

2320 cls="py-8", 

2321 ) 

2322 

2323 

2324def _render_empty_state(search: str, grade_filter: str, has_active_filters: bool) -> Div: 

2325 """Empty state when no creators found.""" 

2326 

2327 # Special handling for handle searches that weren't found 

2328 if search and search.startswith("@"): 2328 ↛ 2329line 2328 didn't jump to line 2329 because the condition on line 2328 was never true

2329 return Card( 

2330 Div( 

2331 Span("🔍", cls="text-6xl block text-center mb-4"), 

2332 H2( 

2333 f"Handle {search} not found", 

2334 cls="text-center text-2xl font-bold mb-2", 

2335 ), 

2336 P( 

2337 "This creator might not exist on YouTube or has a different handle.", 

2338 cls="text-center text-muted-foreground mb-2", 

2339 ), 

2340 P( 

2341 "💡 Try searching without the @ symbol or verify the handle on YouTube first.", 

2342 cls="text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-6", 

2343 ), 

2344 Div( 

2345 A( 

2346 Button("← Back to All Creators", cls=ButtonT.secondary), 

2347 href="/creators", 

2348 ), 

2349 cls="flex justify-center", 

2350 ), 

2351 cls="space-y-4 p-12", 

2352 ), 

2353 cls="bg-accent max-w-md mx-auto", 

2354 ) 

2355 

2356 if has_active_filters: 2356 ↛ 2357line 2356 didn't jump to line 2357 because the condition on line 2356 was never true

2357 return Card( 

2358 Div( 

2359 Span("🔍", cls="text-6xl block text-center mb-4"), 

2360 H2("No creators found", cls="text-center text-2xl font-bold mb-2"), 

2361 P( 

2362 "Try adjusting your filters or search terms", 

2363 cls="text-center text-muted-foreground mb-2", 

2364 ), 

2365 P( 

2366 "💡 Tip: Search by handle like @MrBeast to add creators directly from YouTube", 

2367 cls="text-center text-sm text-blue-600 mb-6", 

2368 ), 

2369 Div( 

2370 A(Button("Clear Filters", cls=ButtonT.secondary), href="/creators"), 

2371 cls="flex justify-center", 

2372 ), 

2373 cls="space-y-4 p-12", 

2374 ), 

2375 cls="bg-accent max-w-md mx-auto", 

2376 ) 

2377 else: 

2378 return Card( 

2379 Div( 

2380 Span("🚀", cls="text-6xl block text-center mb-4"), 

2381 H2( 

2382 "No creators discovered yet", 

2383 cls="text-center text-2xl font-bold mb-2", 

2384 ), 

2385 P( 

2386 "Analyze YouTube playlists to automatically discover and track creators.", 

2387 cls="text-center text-muted-foreground mb-2", 

2388 ), 

2389 P( 

2390 "💡 Or search by handle like @MrBeast to add them directly!", 

2391 cls="text-center text-sm text-blue-600 mb-6", 

2392 ), 

2393 Div( 

2394 A( 

2395 Button("📊 Analyze Your First Playlist", cls=ButtonT.primary), 

2396 href="/#analyze-section", 

2397 ), 

2398 cls="flex justify-center", 

2399 ), 

2400 cls="space-y-4 p-12", 

2401 ), 

2402 cls="bg-background max-w-md mx-auto border border-border", 

2403 ) 

2404 

2405 

2406# ============================================================================ 

2407# HELPER FUNCTIONS 

2408# ============================================================================ 

2409 

2410 

2411def _count_by_grade(creators: list[dict]) -> dict: 

2412 """Count creators by quality grade for filter pills.""" 

2413 counts = {"all": len(creators), "A+": 0, "A": 0, "B+": 0, "B": 0, "C": 0} 

2414 for creator in creators: 

2415 grade = safe_get_value(creator, "quality_grade", "C") 

2416 if grade in counts: 2416 ↛ 2414line 2416 didn't jump to line 2414 because the condition on line 2416 was always true

2417 counts[grade] += 1 

2418 return counts 

2419 

2420 

2421# NOTE: Helper functions moved to utils/creator_metrics.py for better organization 

2422# - get_language_emoji, get_language_name, get_activity_badge 

2423# - estimate_monthly_revenue_v4 (revenue model) 

2424 

2425 

2426# ============================================================================ 

2427# CREATOR PROFILE PAGE 

2428# ============================================================================ 

2429 

2430 

2431def _render_similar_creators( 

2432 creators: list[dict], 

2433 category: str, 

2434 country_code: str, 

2435 current_creator_id: str = "", 

2436) -> Div | None: 

2437 """ 

2438 Horizontal Apple-Music-style scroll rail of similar creators. 

2439 

2440 Each tile is a fixed-width card with a square avatar, channel name, 

2441 subscriber count, and quality grade. The rail uses scroll-snap so 

2442 swiping feels native on mobile. 

2443 

2444 Returns None when the list is empty so callers can safely omit it. 

2445 """ 

2446 if not creators: 2446 ↛ 2449line 2446 didn't jump to line 2449 because the condition on line 2446 was always true

2447 return None 

2448 

2449 _chip_cls = { 

2450 "A+": "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-900/40 dark:text-emerald-300", 

2451 "A": "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/40 dark:text-green-300", 

2452 "B+": "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/40 dark:text-blue-300", 

2453 "B": "bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 dark:bg-sky-900/40 dark:text-sky-300", 

2454 "C": "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/40 dark:text-yellow-300", 

2455 } 

2456 

2457 def _tile(c: dict): 

2458 cid = c.get("id", "") 

2459 name = c.get("channel_name") or "Creator" 

2460 thumb = c.get("channel_thumbnail_url") or "" 

2461 subs = int(c.get("current_subscribers") or 0) 

2462 grade = c.get("quality_grade") or "" 

2463 grade_cls = _chip_cls.get(grade, "bg-accent text-muted-foreground") 

2464 

2465 avatar = ( 

2466 Img( 

2467 src=thumb, 

2468 alt=name, 

2469 cls="w-full aspect-square object-cover rounded-xl", 

2470 loading="lazy", 

2471 ) 

2472 if thumb 

2473 else Div( 

2474 Span(name[:1].upper(), cls="text-xl font-bold text-muted-foreground"), 

2475 cls="w-full aspect-square rounded-xl bg-accent flex items-center justify-center", 

2476 ) 

2477 ) 

2478 

2479 return Div( 

2480 A( 

2481 Div( 

2482 avatar, 

2483 Div( 

2484 P( 

2485 name, 

2486 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground leading-tight line-clamp-2 mt-2", 

2487 ), 

2488 Div( 

2489 Span( 

2490 format_number(subs), 

2491 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground", 

2492 ), 

2493 *( 

2494 [ 

2495 Span( 

2496 grade, 

2497 cls=f"text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full {grade_cls}", 

2498 ) 

2499 ] 

2500 if grade 

2501 else [] 

2502 ), 

2503 cls="flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-0.5", 

2504 ), 

2505 ), 

2506 cls="flex flex-col", 

2507 ), 

2508 href=f"/creator/{cid}", 

2509 cls="no-underline", 

2510 ), 

2511 # ⇄ Compare link below the tile 

2512 *( 

2513 [ 

2514 A( 

2515 UkIcon("git-compare", cls="w-3 h-3 mr-0.5"), 

2516 "Compare", 

2517 href=f"/compare?a={current_creator_id}&b={cid}", 

2518 cls="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary no-underline flex items-center justify-center mt-1 transition-colors", 

2519 ) 

2520 ] 

2521 if current_creator_id 

2522 else [] 

2523 ), 

2524 cls="flex-shrink-0 w-28 sm:w-32 snap-start flex flex-col", 

2525 ) 

2526 

2527 tiles = [_tile(c) for c in creators] 

2528 

2529 # Determine the "See all" link — prefer category, fall back to country 

2530 if category: 

2531 see_all_href = f"/lists/category/{slugify(category)}" 

2532 see_all_label = f"{get_topic_category_emoji(category)} {category}" 

2533 elif country_code: 

2534 see_all_href = f"/lists/country/{country_code.upper()}" 

2535 see_all_label = f"{get_country_flag(country_code)} {country_code.upper()}" 

2536 else: 

2537 see_all_href = "/creators" 

2538 see_all_label = "All creators" 

2539 

2540 rail_id = f"similar-rail-{current_creator_id or 'x'}" 

2541 return Card( 

2542 Div( 

2543 H2("You may also like", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground"), 

2544 A( 

2545 see_all_label + " →", 

2546 href=see_all_href, 

2547 cls="text-xs font-medium text-primary hover:underline no-underline shrink-0", 

2548 ), 

2549 cls="flex items-center justify-between mb-3", 

2550 ), 

2551 Div( 

2552 *tiles, 

2553 id=rail_id, 

2554 cls=( 

2555 "flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-2" 

2556 " snap-x snap-mandatory" 

2557 " scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent" 

2558 " -mx-1 px-1" 

2559 ), 

2560 ), 

2561 body_cls="p-5", 

2562 cls="mb-6", 

2563 ) 

2564 

2565 

2566def render_creator_profile_page( 

2567 creator: dict, 

2568 back_url: str = "/creators", 

2569 context_ranks: dict | None = None, 

2570 category_stats: dict | None = None, 

2571 is_favourited: bool = False, 

2572 similar_creators: list[dict] | None = None, 

2573 peer_engagement_p75: float = 0.0, 

2574 niche_leaderboard: list[dict] | None = None, 

2575 recent_upload: dict | None = None, 

2576) -> Div: 

2577 """ 

2578 Full-page creator profile — award-showcase design. 

2579 

2580 Args: 

2581 creator: Creator dict from get_creator_stats(). 

2582 back_url: Href for the ← Back button. 

2583 context_ranks: Optional {country_rank, language_rank, category_rank} 

2584 ints from _get_context_ranks() in routes/creators.py. 

2585 category_stats: Optional pre-aggregated box plot stats from 

2586 get_cached_category_box_stats() — passed through to 

2587 render_category_box_plots(). None = show placeholder. 

2588 is_favourited: Whether the current user has already favourited this 

2589 creator. Drives the initial heart-button state. 

2590 Pass False (default) for unauthenticated visitors. 

2591 

2592 Layout: 

2593 1. Cinematic banner + overlapping avatar + identity strip 

2594 2. 4-up stat cards with 30d deltas 

2595 3. Two-column body: 

2596 Left — About + Channel Info + Social Links + Featured Channels 

2597 Right — Performance + trend bar + Topics (with rank chips) + 

2598 Rankings card + Category breakdown 

2599 4. Similar creators horizontal scroll rail 

2600 5. Sync / freshness footer 

2601 """ 

2602 context_ranks = context_ranks or {} 

2603 # ── identity ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

2604 creator_id = safe_get_value(creator, "id", "") 

2605 channel_id = safe_get_value(creator, "channel_id", "") 

2606 channel_name = safe_get_value(creator, "channel_name", "Unknown Creator") 

2607 custom_url = safe_get_value(creator, "custom_url", "") 

2608 channel_url = ( 

2609 safe_get_value(creator, "channel_url") or f"https://www.youtube.com/channel/{channel_id}" 

2610 ) 

2611 thumbnail_url = safe_get_value(creator, "channel_thumbnail_url") or "/static/favicon.jpeg" 

2612 banner_url = safe_get_value(creator, "banner_image_url", "") 

2613 bio = safe_get_value(creator, "channel_description") or safe_get_value(creator, "bio", "") 

2614 keywords = safe_get_value(creator, "keywords", "") 

2615 country_code = safe_get_value(creator, "country_code", "") 

2616 language = safe_get_value(creator, "default_language", "") 

2617 quality_grade = safe_get_value(creator, "quality_grade", "C") 

2618 official = safe_get_value(creator, "official", False) 

2619 hidden_subs = safe_get_value(creator, "hidden_subscriber_count", False) 

2620 primary_category = safe_get_value(creator, "primary_category", "") 

2621 published_at = safe_get_value(creator, "published_at", "") 

2622 channel_age_days = safe_get_value(creator, "channel_age_days", 0) or 0 

2623 monthly_uploads = safe_get_value(creator, "monthly_uploads", 0) or 0 

2624 topic_categories_raw = safe_get_value(creator, "topic_categories") 

2625 category_distribution = safe_get_value(creator, "category_distribution") 

2626 featured_channels_raw = safe_get_value(creator, "featured_channels_urls", "") 

2627 last_updated = safe_get_value(creator, "last_updated_at", "") 

2628 last_synced = safe_get_value(creator, "last_synced_at", "") 

2629 sync_status = safe_get_value(creator, "sync_status", "pending") 

2630 

2631 # ── numeric stats ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

2632 current_subs = int(safe_get_value(creator, "current_subscribers", 0) or 0) 

2633 current_views = int(safe_get_value(creator, "current_view_count", 0) or 0) 

2634 current_videos = int(safe_get_value(creator, "current_video_count", 0) or 0) 

2635 subs_change_raw = safe_get_value(creator, "subscribers_change_30d", None) 

2636 subs_change = int(subs_change_raw) if subs_change_raw is not None else None 

2637 views_change_raw = safe_get_value(creator, "views_change_30d", None) 

2638 views_change = int(views_change_raw) if views_change_raw is not None else None 

2639 videos_change_raw = safe_get_value(creator, "videos_change_30d", None) 

2640 videos_change = int(videos_change_raw) if videos_change_raw is not None else None 

2641 engagement_score = float(safe_get_value(creator, "engagement_score", 0) or 0) 

2642 

2643 # ── derived ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

2644 grade_icon, grade_label, grade_bg = get_grade_info(quality_grade) 

2645 growth_rate = calculate_growth_rate(subs_change, current_subs) 

2646 growth_label, growth_style = get_growth_signal(growth_rate) 

2647 avg_views = calculate_avg_views_per_video(current_views, current_videos) 

2648 views_per_sub = calculate_views_per_subscriber(current_views, current_subs) 

2649 momentum_score = calculate_momentum_score(views_change, subs_change, current_subs) 

2650 if momentum_score is not None: 2650 ↛ 2653line 2650 didn't jump to line 2653 because the condition on line 2650 was always true

2651 momentum_label, momentum_style = get_momentum_label(momentum_score) 

2652 else: 

2653 momentum_label, momentum_style = None, "" 

2654 # v4 revenue model — country + niche-aware, Shorts-split, sponsorships included 

2655 _rev = estimate_monthly_revenue_v4( 

2656 total_subs=current_subs, 

2657 total_views=current_views, 

2658 video_count=current_videos, 

2659 country_code=country_code or "US", 

2660 niche=primary_category or "general", 

2661 ) 

2662 estimated_revenue = int(_rev["est_monthly_total"]) 

2663 revenue_split = _rev["revenue_split"] 

2664 assumed_shorts_pct = _rev["assumed_shorts_pct"] 

2665 handle_display = f"@{custom_url.lstrip('@')}" if custom_url else "" 

2666 country_flag = get_country_flag(country_code) if country_code else "" 

2667 lang_emoji = get_language_emoji(language) if language else "" 

2668 lang_name = get_language_name(language) if language else "" 

2669 

2670 # ── parsed extras ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

2671 social_links = _extract_socials(bio or "", keywords or "") 

2672 featured_ch_urls = _parse_featured_channels(featured_channels_raw or "") 

2673 

2674 # ── context ranks (from route layer) ────────────────────────────────────── 

2675 country_rank = context_ranks.get("country_rank") 

2676 language_rank = context_ranks.get("language_rank") 

2677 category_rank = context_ranks.get("category_rank") 

2678 

2679 # ── small helpers (private to this call) ───────────────────────────────── 

2680 def _delta_badge(val: int | None, pct: float | None = None) -> Span | None: 

2681 """Inline +/- badge for 30-day delta next to a stat value. 

2682 

2683 When pct is provided (subscribers only) renders e.g. "+280K 30d ↑6.7%". 

2684 pct == 0 is treated as neutral (no arrow, grey) to avoid implying growth. 

2685 """ 

2686 if val is None: 

2687 return None 

2688 colour = ( 

2689 "text-green-600 bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-900/30" 

2690 if val > 0 

2691 else ( 

2692 "text-red-600 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/30" 

2693 if val < 0 

2694 else "text-muted-foreground bg-accent" 

2695 ) 

2696 ) 

2697 sign = "+" if val > 0 else "" 

2698 text = f"{sign}{format_number(val)} 30d" 

2699 if pct is not None and pct != 0: 

2700 arrow = "↑" if pct > 0 else "↓" 

2701 text += f" {arrow}{abs(pct):.1f}%" 

2702 return Span( 

2703 text, 

2704 cls=f"text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full {colour} ml-1.5", 

2705 ) 

2706 

2707 def _info_row(icon: str, label: str, value: str): 

2708 """One metadata row: UkIcon | label / value.""" 

2709 return Div( 

2710 UkIcon(icon, cls="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground shrink-0 mt-0.5"), 

2711 Div( 

2712 Span(label, cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground block leading-none"), 

2713 Span(value, cls="text-sm font-medium text-foreground leading-snug"), 

2714 ), 

2715 cls="flex items-start gap-2.5", 

2716 ) 

2717 

2718 def _perf_row(label: str, value: str, value_cls: str = "text-foreground"): 

2719 return Div( 

2720 Span(label, cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground"), 

2721 Span(value, cls=f"text-sm font-semibold {value_cls}"), 

2722 cls="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-border last:border-0", 

2723 ) 

2724 

2725 def _rank_chip(text: str, href: str, title: str): 

2726 """Linked pill chip for rank badges in the identity strip.""" 

2727 return A( 

2728 text, 

2729 href=href, 

2730 title=title, 

2731 cls="text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-accent text-foreground hover:bg-accent/80 no-underline transition-colors", 

2732 ) 

2733 

2734 def _stat_card(label, value, delta_val, number_cls, bg_cls, *, delta_pct=None, rank_line=None): 

2735 return Card( 

2736 Div( 

2737 P( 

2738 label, 

2739 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest", 

2740 ), 

2741 Div( 

2742 Span(value, cls=f"text-3xl font-bold {number_cls}"), 

2743 _delta_badge(delta_val, pct=delta_pct), 

2744 cls="flex items-baseline flex-wrap mt-1", 

2745 ), 

2746 rank_line, 

2747 ), 

2748 cls=f"{bg_cls} border-0", 

2749 body_cls="p-4", 

2750 ) 

2751 

2752 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

2753 # SECTION 1 — Cinematic banner + overlapping avatar + identity strip 

2754 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

2755 # Banner layer 

2756 banner_layer = ( 

2757 Div( 

2758 # Dark gradient overlay — ensures text legibility on any banner image 

2759 Div( 

2760 cls="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/50 via-transparent to-transparent" 

2761 ), 

2762 style=( 

2763 f"background-image:url('{banner_url}');" 

2764 "background-size:cover;background-position:center top;" 

2765 "height:220px;" 

2766 ), 

2767 cls="relative w-full rounded-t-xl", 

2768 ) 

2769 if banner_url 

2770 else Div( 

2771 cls="w-full rounded-t-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-700 via-violet-700 to-pink-600", 

2772 style="height:220px;", 

2773 ) 

2774 ) 

2775 

2776 # Identity strip — sits below the banner, avatar overlaps upward 

2777 identity_strip = Div( 

2778 # ── Row 1: avatar (overlapping banner) + CTA buttons flush right ───── 

2779 # Keeping avatar and buttons in the same row ensures buttons are always 

2780 # reachable and never clip off-screen on narrow viewports. 

2781 Div( 

2782 Img( 

2783 src=thumbnail_url, 

2784 alt=channel_name, 

2785 # Smaller avatar on mobile so the negative-margin lift stays proportional 

2786 cls="w-20 h-20 sm:w-28 sm:h-28 rounded-2xl object-cover ring-4 ring-background shadow-xl -mt-10 sm:-mt-14", 

2787 ), 

2788 Div( 

2789 A( 

2790 UkIcon("youtube", cls="w-4 h-4 mr-1.5"), 

2791 "YouTube", 

2792 href=channel_url, 

2793 target="_blank", 

2794 rel="noopener noreferrer", 

2795 cls="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg no-underline transition-colors", 

2796 ), 

2797 render_favourite_button(creator_id, is_favourited=is_favourited), 

2798 A( 

2799 UkIcon("git-compare", cls="w-4 h-4 mr-1"), 

2800 "Compare", 

2801 href=f"/compare?a={creator_id}&b=", 

2802 id="compare-btn", 

2803 title="Compare with another creator — paste a creator profile URL as ?b=<id>", 

2804 cls="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 bg-accent hover:bg-accent/80 text-foreground text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg no-underline transition-colors", 

2805 ), 

2806 A( 

2807 UkIcon("map", cls="w-4 h-4 mr-1"), 

2808 "Blueprint", 

2809 href=f"/creator/{creator_id}/blueprint?from=/creator/{creator_id}&name={quote_plus(channel_name)}", 

2810 title="Growth Blueprint — Studio-grounded actions ranked by confidence", 

2811 cls="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 bg-primary/10 hover:bg-primary/20 text-primary text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg no-underline transition-colors", 

2812 ), 

2813 A( 

2814 UkIcon("arrow-left", cls="w-4 h-4 mr-1"), 

2815 "Back", 

2816 href=back_url, 

2817 cls="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 bg-accent hover:bg-accent/80 text-foreground text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg no-underline transition-colors", 

2818 ), 

2819 cls="flex gap-2 ml-auto items-center flex-wrap justify-end", 

2820 ), 

2821 cls="flex items-end justify-between px-4 sm:px-5 pt-3", 

2822 ), 

2823 # ── Row 2: name + meta — full width so tags can wrap freely ────────── 

2824 Div( 

2825 # Name + badges 

2826 Div( 

2827 H1( 

2828 channel_name, 

2829 cls="text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-3xl font-bold text-foreground leading-tight", 

2830 ), 

2831 ( 

2832 Span( 

2833 UkIcon("badge-check", cls="w-4 h-4 mr-1 inline"), 

2834 "Official", 

2835 cls="inline-flex items-center text-xs font-semibold bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full shrink-0", 

2836 ) 

2837 if official 

2838 else None 

2839 ), 

2840 cls="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap", 

2841 ), 

2842 # Rank chips — grade + subscriber rank badges, links to list pages 

2843 *( 

2844 [ 

2845 Div( 

2846 ( 

2847 Span( 

2848 f"{grade_icon} {grade_label}", 

2849 cls=f"text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full {grade_bg}", 

2850 ) 

2851 if quality_grade 

2852 else None 

2853 ), 

2854 ( 

2855 _rank_chip( 

2856 f"#{country_rank} {country_flag} {country_code.upper()}", 

2857 href=f"/lists/country/{country_code.upper()}", 

2858 title=f"#{country_rank} by subscribers in {country_code.upper()}", 

2859 ) 

2860 if country_rank is not None and country_code 

2861 else None 

2862 ), 

2863 ( 

2864 _rank_chip( 

2865 f"#{category_rank} {get_topic_category_emoji(primary_category)} {primary_category[:20]}", 

2866 href=f"/lists/category/{slugify(primary_category)}", 

2867 title=f"#{category_rank} by subscribers in {primary_category}", 

2868 ) 

2869 if category_rank is not None and primary_category 

2870 else None 

2871 ), 

2872 cls="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5 mt-1", 

2873 ) 

2874 ] 

2875 if (quality_grade or country_rank is not None or category_rank is not None) 

2876 else [] 

2877 ), 

2878 # Handle + country + language + age tags 

2879 # Previously these were width-starved inside a flex child with no 

2880 # declared width, forcing each tag onto its own line. Now they sit 

2881 # in a full-width block and wrap naturally. 

2882 Div( 

2883 ( 

2884 Span(handle_display, cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground font-mono") 

2885 if handle_display 

2886 else None 

2887 ), 

2888 ( 

2889 Span( 

2890 f"{country_flag} {country_code.upper()}", 

2891 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground", 

2892 title=country_code.upper(), 

2893 ) 

2894 if country_code 

2895 else None 

2896 ), 

2897 ( 

2898 Span(f"{lang_emoji} {lang_name}", cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground") 

2899 if language 

2900 else None 

2901 ), 

2902 ( 

2903 Span( 

2904 f"📅 {format_channel_age(channel_age_days)}", 

2905 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground px-2 py-0.5 bg-accent rounded-full", 

2906 ) 

2907 if channel_age_days 

2908 else None 

2909 ), 

2910 ( 

2911 Span( 

2912 f"📹 {monthly_uploads:.1f}/mo", 

2913 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground px-2 py-0.5 bg-accent rounded-full", 

2914 ) 

2915 if monthly_uploads 

2916 else None 

2917 ), 

2918 cls="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-x-3 gap-y-1.5 mt-1.5", 

2919 ), 

2920 cls="px-4 sm:px-5 pb-4 sm:pb-5 pt-3", 

2921 ), 

2922 cls="bg-background", 

2923 ) 

2924 

2925 banner_section = Div( 

2926 banner_layer, 

2927 identity_strip, 

2928 cls="bg-background rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm mb-6 overflow-hidden", 

2929 ) 

2930 

2931 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

2932 # SECTION 2 — 4-up stat cards (dark-mode safe) 

2933 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

2934 # Rank line for Subscribers card — prefer country, fall back to category 

2935 _subs_rank_line = None 

2936 if not hidden_subs: 2936 ↛ 2953line 2936 didn't jump to line 2953 because the condition on line 2936 was always true

2937 if country_rank is not None and country_code: 2937 ↛ 2938line 2937 didn't jump to line 2938 because the condition on line 2937 was never true

2938 _subs_rank_line = Div( 

2939 Span(f"#{country_rank}", cls="text-xs font-bold text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-400"), 

2940 Span( 

2941 f" in {country_flag} {country_code.upper()}", 

2942 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground", 

2943 ), 

2944 cls="mt-2", 

2945 ) 

2946 elif category_rank is not None and primary_category: 2946 ↛ 2947line 2946 didn't jump to line 2947 because the condition on line 2946 was never true

2947 _subs_rank_line = Div( 

2948 Span(f"#{category_rank}", cls="text-xs font-bold text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-400"), 

2949 Span(f" in {primary_category}", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground"), 

2950 cls="mt-2", 

2951 ) 

2952 

2953 stats_row = Grid( 

2954 _stat_card( 

2955 "Subscribers", 

2956 format_number(current_subs) if not hidden_subs else "Hidden", 

2957 subs_change, 

2958 "text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400", 

2959 "bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/40", 

2960 delta_pct=growth_rate if subs_change is not None else None, 

2961 rank_line=_subs_rank_line, 

2962 ), 

2963 _stat_card( 

2964 "Total Views", 

2965 format_number(current_views), 

2966 views_change, 

2967 "text-violet-600 dark:text-violet-400", 

2968 "bg-violet-50 dark:bg-violet-950/40", 

2969 ), 

2970 _stat_card( 

2971 "Videos Published", 

2972 format_number(current_videos), 

2973 videos_change, 

2974 "text-foreground", 

2975 "bg-accent", 

2976 ), 

2977 _stat_card( 

2978 "Est. Revenue", 

2979 f"${format_number(estimated_revenue)}/mo", 

2980 None, 

2981 "text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400", 

2982 "bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/40", 

2983 ), 

2984 cols_sm=2, 

2985 cols_lg=4, 

2986 cls="mb-6", 

2987 ) 

2988 

2989 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

2990 # SECTION 3 — Two-column body 

2991 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

2992 

2993 # ── Left column: About + Channel Info ───────────────────────────────────── 

2994 keyword_list = [k.strip() for k in keywords.split(",") if k.strip()] if keywords else [] 

2995 keyword_pills = ( 

2996 Div( 

2997 *[ 

2998 Span( 

2999 kw, 

3000 cls="text-xs px-2.5 py-1 bg-accent text-muted-foreground rounded-full", 

3001 ) 

3002 for kw in keyword_list[:15] 

3003 ], 

3004 cls="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-3", 

3005 ) 

3006 if keyword_list 

3007 else None 

3008 ) 

3009 

3010 about_card = Card( 

3011 H2("About", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground mb-3"), 

3012 ( 

3013 P( 

3014 bio, 

3015 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line", 

3016 ) 

3017 if bio 

3018 else P("No description available.", cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground italic") 

3019 ), 

3020 keyword_pills, 

3021 body_cls="p-5", 

3022 ) 

3023 

3024 channel_info_items = [ 

3025 _info_row("link", "Handle", handle_display) if handle_display else None, 

3026 _info_row("calendar", "Founded", published_at[:10] if published_at else "Unknown"), 

3027 _info_row( 

3028 "clock", 

3029 "Channel Age", 

3030 format_channel_age(channel_age_days) if channel_age_days else "Unknown", 

3031 ), 

3032 _info_row( 

3033 "globe", 

3034 "Country", 

3035 f"{country_flag} {country_code.upper()}" if country_code else "Unknown", 

3036 ), 

3037 _info_row( 

3038 "languages", 

3039 "Language", 

3040 f"{lang_emoji} {lang_name}" if language else "Unknown", 

3041 ), 

3042 _info_row("tag", "Category", primary_category) if primary_category else None, 

3043 _info_row("video", "Total Videos", format_number(current_videos)), 

3044 _info_row( 

3045 "upload", 

3046 "Upload Rate", 

3047 f"{monthly_uploads:.1f} videos/month" if monthly_uploads else "—", 

3048 ), 

3049 (_info_row("eye-off", "Subscriber Count", "Hidden on YouTube") if hidden_subs else None), 

3050 ] 

3051 

3052 channel_info_card = Card( 

3053 H2("Channel Info", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground mb-4"), 

3054 Div(*[i for i in channel_info_items if i], cls="space-y-3"), 

3055 body_cls="p-5", 

3056 ) 

3057 

3058 # ── Recent Upload card ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

3059 # Use the parameter if explicitly provided, otherwise fall back to the 

3060 # cached value stored in the creator row. 

3061 _ru = recent_upload or safe_get_value(creator, "recent_upload") 

3062 if isinstance(_ru, str): 3062 ↛ 3063line 3062 didn't jump to line 3063 because the condition on line 3062 was never true

3063 try: 

3064 _ru = json.loads(_ru) 

3065 except Exception: 

3066 _ru = None 

3067 recent_upload_card = None 

3068 if isinstance(_ru, dict) and _ru.get("video_id"): 3068 ↛ 3069line 3068 didn't jump to line 3069 because the condition on line 3068 was never true

3069 ru_vid_id = _ru["video_id"] 

3070 ru_title = _ru.get("title") or "Untitled" 

3071 ru_thumb = _ru.get("thumbnail_url") or "" 

3072 ru_views = int(_ru.get("view_count") or 0) 

3073 ru_pub = _ru.get("published_at") or "" 

3074 ru_dur_sec = int(_ru.get("duration_sec") or 0) 

3075 ru_is_short = bool(_ru.get("is_short")) 

3076 ru_url = f"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v={ru_vid_id}" 

3077 ru_dur_str = f"{ru_dur_sec // 60}:{ru_dur_sec % 60:02d}" if ru_dur_sec > 0 else "" 

3078 recent_upload_card = Card( 

3079 Div( 

3080 UkIcon("play-circle", cls="w-4 h-4 text-red-500 mr-2"), 

3081 H2("Latest Upload", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground"), 

3082 *( 

3083 [ 

3084 Span( 

3085 "#Shorts", 

3086 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400 ml-auto", 

3087 ) 

3088 ] 

3089 if ru_is_short 

3090 else [] 

3091 ), 

3092 cls="flex items-center mb-3", 

3093 ), 

3094 A( 

3095 Div( 

3096 *( 

3097 [ 

3098 Img( 

3099 src=ru_thumb, 

3100 alt=ru_title, 

3101 cls="w-full rounded-lg object-cover aspect-video", 

3102 loading="lazy", 

3103 ) 

3104 ] 

3105 if ru_thumb 

3106 else [] 

3107 ), 

3108 cls="relative", 

3109 ), 

3110 P( 

3111 ru_title, 

3112 cls="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground mt-2 line-clamp-2 hover:underline", 

3113 ), 

3114 href=ru_url, 

3115 target="_blank", 

3116 rel="noopener noreferrer", 

3117 cls="no-underline block", 

3118 ), 

3119 Div( 

3120 Span( 

3121 f"{format_number(ru_views)} views", 

3122 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground", 

3123 ), 

3124 *( 

3125 [ 

3126 Span("·", cls="text-border mx-1"), 

3127 Span(ru_dur_str, cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground"), 

3128 ] 

3129 if ru_dur_str 

3130 else [] 

3131 ), 

3132 *( 

3133 [ 

3134 Span("·", cls="text-border mx-1"), 

3135 Span(format_date_relative(ru_pub), cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground"), 

3136 ] 

3137 if ru_pub 

3138 else [] 

3139 ), 

3140 cls="flex items-center flex-wrap mt-2", 

3141 ), 

3142 body_cls="p-5", 

3143 ) 

3144 

3145 # Default left_col — overridden below if social/featured cards are present 

3146 left_col = Div( 

3147 about_card, 

3148 channel_info_card, 

3149 *(recent_upload_card and [recent_upload_card] or []), 

3150 cls="flex flex-col gap-4", 

3151 ) 

3152 

3153 # ── Social links card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 

3154 if social_links: 3154 ↛ 3155line 3154 didn't jump to line 3155 because the condition on line 3154 was never true

3155 social_card = Card( 

3156 Div( 

3157 UkIcon("share-2", cls="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground mr-2"), 

3158 H2("Connect", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground"), 

3159 cls="flex items-center mb-4", 

3160 ), 

3161 Div( 

3162 *[ 

3163 A( 

3164 UkIcon(icon, cls="w-4 h-4 shrink-0"), 

3165 # For email show the address; for social show the label 

3166 Span( 

3167 label if icon != "mail" else href.replace("mailto:", ""), 

3168 cls="text-sm font-medium truncate", 

3169 ), 

3170 href=href, 

3171 target=None if href.startswith("mailto:") else "_blank", 

3172 rel=(None if href.startswith("mailto:") else "noopener noreferrer"), 

3173 cls=f"inline-flex items-center gap-2 no-underline transition-colors {_SOCIAL_COLOURS.get(icon, 'text-foreground hover:text-primary')}", 

3174 ) 

3175 for icon, label, href in social_links 

3176 ], 

3177 cls="flex flex-col gap-2.5", 

3178 ), 

3179 body_cls="p-5", 

3180 ) 

3181 left_col = Div( 

3182 about_card, 

3183 channel_info_card, 

3184 social_card, 

3185 *(recent_upload_card and [recent_upload_card] or []), 

3186 cls="flex flex-col gap-4", 

3187 ) 

3188 

3189 # ── Featured channels card ───────────────────────────────────────────────── 

3190 if featured_ch_urls: 3190 ↛ 3191line 3190 didn't jump to line 3191 because the condition on line 3190 was never true

3191 featured_card = Card( 

3192 Div( 

3193 UkIcon("users", cls="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground mr-2"), 

3194 H2("Featured Channels", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground"), 

3195 cls="flex items-center mb-4", 

3196 ), 

3197 Div( 

3198 *[ 

3199 A( 

3200 UkIcon("external-link", cls="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0"), 

3201 Span( 

3202 urlparse(url).path.lstrip("/@").split("?")[0] or url, 

3203 cls="text-sm truncate", 

3204 ), 

3205 href=url, 

3206 target="_blank", 

3207 rel="noopener noreferrer", 

3208 cls="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-primary hover:underline no-underline", 

3209 ) 

3210 for url in featured_ch_urls 

3211 ], 

3212 cls="flex flex-col gap-2", 

3213 ), 

3214 body_cls="p-5", 

3215 ) 

3216 left_col = Div( 

3217 about_card, 

3218 channel_info_card, 

3219 *(social_links and [social_card] or []), 

3220 featured_card, 

3221 *(recent_upload_card and [recent_upload_card] or []), 

3222 cls="flex flex-col gap-4", 

3223 ) 

3224 

3225 # ── Right column: Performance + Growth trend ─────────────────────────────── 

3226 # Hero-level secondary metrics 

3227 # ── engagement comparison vs category peers ─────────────────────────────── 

3228 if peer_engagement_p75 > 0 and engagement_score > 0: 3228 ↛ 3229line 3228 didn't jump to line 3229 because the condition on line 3228 was never true

3229 eng_ratio = engagement_score / peer_engagement_p75 

3230 if eng_ratio >= 1.1: 

3231 eng_vs = f"{eng_ratio:.1f}× category avg" 

3232 eng_vs_cls = "text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400" 

3233 elif eng_ratio <= 0.75: 

3234 eng_vs = f"{eng_ratio:.1f}× category avg" 

3235 eng_vs_cls = "text-red-500" 

3236 else: 

3237 eng_vs = "≈ category avg" 

3238 eng_vs_cls = "text-muted-foreground" 

3239 else: 

3240 eng_vs = None 

3241 eng_vs_cls = "" 

3242 

3243 secondary_metrics = Div( 

3244 _perf_row("Avg Views / Video", format_number(avg_views)), 

3245 _perf_row("Views / Subscriber", f"{views_per_sub:.2f}x"), 

3246 _perf_row( 

3247 "Upload Rate", 

3248 f"{monthly_uploads:.1f} / month" if monthly_uploads else "—", 

3249 ), 

3250 Div( 

3251 Div( 

3252 Span( 

3253 "Engagement Score", 

3254 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground", 

3255 ), 

3256 Div( 

3257 Span( 

3258 f"{engagement_score:.2f} / 10", 

3259 cls="text-sm font-semibold " 

3260 + ("text-blue-600" if engagement_score >= 7 else "text-foreground"), 

3261 ), 

3262 *([Span(eng_vs, cls=f"text-xs ml-2 {eng_vs_cls}")] if eng_vs else []), 

3263 cls="flex items-center gap-1", 

3264 ), 

3265 cls="flex justify-between items-center py-1.5", 

3266 ), 

3267 ), 

3268 *( 

3269 [ 

3270 Div( 

3271 Span("Momentum", cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground"), 

3272 Div( 

3273 Span(f"{momentum_score:.0f}", cls="text-sm font-bold text-foreground"), 

3274 Span( 

3275 momentum_label, 

3276 cls=f"text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border ml-2 {momentum_style}", 

3277 ), 

3278 cls="flex items-center", 

3279 ), 

3280 cls="flex justify-between items-center py-1.5", 

3281 ) 

3282 ] 

3283 if momentum_label 

3284 else [] 

3285 ), 

3286 ) 

3287 has_growth_data = subs_change is not None 

3288 if has_growth_data: 3288 ↛ 3321line 3288 didn't jump to line 3321 because the condition on line 3288 was always true

3289 bar_width = min(100, max(2, abs(growth_rate) * 5)) 

3290 bar_colour = "bg-emerald-500" if growth_rate >= 0 else "bg-red-500" 

3291 trend_bg = ( 

3292 "bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/30" 

3293 if growth_rate >= 0 

3294 else "bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/30" 

3295 ) 

3296 trend_section = Div( 

3297 DivFullySpaced( 

3298 P( 

3299 "30-Day Growth", 

3300 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide", 

3301 ), 

3302 Div( 

3303 Span(f"{growth_rate:+.1f}%", cls="text-sm font-bold text-foreground"), 

3304 Span( 

3305 growth_label, 

3306 cls=f"text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border {growth_style} ml-2", 

3307 ), 

3308 cls="flex items-center", 

3309 ), 

3310 ), 

3311 Div( 

3312 Div( 

3313 cls=f"h-2 {bar_colour} rounded-full transition-all", 

3314 style=f"width:{bar_width}%", 

3315 ), 

3316 cls="w-full h-2 bg-border rounded-full overflow-hidden mt-2", 

3317 ), 

3318 cls=f"{trend_bg} rounded-xl p-4 mt-4", 

3319 ) 

3320 else: 

3321 trend_section = Div( 

3322 UkIcon("bar-chart-2", cls="w-6 h-6 text-muted-foreground mb-1"), 

3323 P( 

3324 "Growth tracking initializing", 

3325 cls="text-sm font-medium text-foreground", 

3326 ), 

3327 P("Check back in 7+ days", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"), 

3328 cls="flex flex-col items-center text-center bg-accent rounded-xl p-4 mt-4", 

3329 ) 

3330 

3331 performance_card = Card( 

3332 H2("Performance", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground mb-1"), 

3333 secondary_metrics, 

3334 trend_section, 

3335 # ── Revenue breakdown (v4 model) ───────────────────────────────────── 

3336 Div( 

3337 DivFullySpaced( 

3338 Div( 

3339 UkIcon("circle-dollar-sign", cls="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-500 mr-1.5"), 

3340 Span( 

3341 "Est. Monthly Revenue", 

3342 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide", 

3343 ), 

3344 cls="flex items-center", 

3345 ), 

3346 Span( 

3347 f"${format_number(estimated_revenue)}", 

3348 cls="text-sm font-bold text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400", 

3349 ), 

3350 cls="mb-2", 

3351 ), 

3352 Div( 

3353 _perf_row( 

3354 "AdSense — long-form", 

3355 f"${format_number(revenue_split['adsense_long'])}", 

3356 "text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400", 

3357 ), 

3358 _perf_row( 

3359 "AdSense — Shorts", 

3360 f"${format_number(revenue_split['adsense_shorts'])}", 

3361 "text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400", 

3362 ), 

3363 _perf_row( 

3364 "Brand deals (est.)", 

3365 f"${format_number(revenue_split['brand_deals'])}", 

3366 "text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400", 

3367 ), 

3368 _perf_row( 

3369 "Assumed Shorts mix", 

3370 assumed_shorts_pct, 

3371 ), 

3372 ), 

3373 cls="bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/30 rounded-xl p-4 mt-4", 

3374 ), 

3375 body_cls="p-5", 

3376 ) 

3377 

3378 # ── Rankings card (country / language / category) ───────────────────────── 

3379 ranking_rows = [] 

3380 if country_rank is not None and country_code: 3380 ↛ 3381line 3380 didn't jump to line 3381 because the condition on line 3380 was never true

3381 ranking_rows.append( 

3382 Div( 

3383 Span( 

3384 f"{country_flag} {country_code.upper()}", 

3385 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground", 

3386 ), 

3387 Div( 

3388 A( 

3389 f"#{country_rank}", 

3390 href=f"/lists/country/{country_code.upper()}", 

3391 cls="text-sm font-bold text-primary hover:underline no-underline", 

3392 title=f"Ranked #{country_rank} in {country_code.upper()} by subscribers", 

3393 ), 

3394 Span("in country", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-1"), 

3395 cls="flex items-center", 

3396 ), 

3397 cls="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-border last:border-0", 

3398 ) 

3399 ) 

3400 if language_rank is not None and language: 3400 ↛ 3401line 3400 didn't jump to line 3401 because the condition on line 3400 was never true

3401 ranking_rows.append( 

3402 Div( 

3403 Span(f"{lang_emoji} {lang_name}", cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground"), 

3404 Div( 

3405 A( 

3406 f"#{language_rank}", 

3407 href=f"/lists/language/{language.lower()}", 

3408 cls="text-sm font-bold text-primary hover:underline no-underline", 

3409 title=f"Ranked #{language_rank} in {lang_name} by subscribers", 

3410 ), 

3411 Span("in language", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-1"), 

3412 cls="flex items-center", 

3413 ), 

3414 cls="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-border last:border-0", 

3415 ) 

3416 ) 

3417 if category_rank is not None and primary_category: 3417 ↛ 3418line 3417 didn't jump to line 3418 because the condition on line 3417 was never true

3418 ranking_rows.append( 

3419 Div( 

3420 Span( 

3421 f"{get_topic_category_emoji(primary_category)} {primary_category}", 

3422 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground", 

3423 ), 

3424 Div( 

3425 A( 

3426 f"#{category_rank}", 

3427 href=f"/lists/category/{slugify(primary_category)}", 

3428 cls="text-sm font-bold text-primary hover:underline no-underline", 

3429 title=f"Ranked #{category_rank} in {primary_category} by subscribers", 

3430 ), 

3431 Span("in category", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-1"), 

3432 cls="flex items-center", 

3433 ), 

3434 cls="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-border last:border-0", 

3435 ) 

3436 ) 

3437 

3438 rankings_card = ( 

3439 Card( 

3440 Div( 

3441 UkIcon("trophy", cls="w-4 h-4 text-amber-500 mr-2"), 

3442 H2("Rankings", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground"), 

3443 cls="flex items-center mb-3", 

3444 ), 

3445 Div(*ranking_rows), 

3446 body_cls="p-5", 

3447 ) 

3448 if ranking_rows 

3449 else None 

3450 ) 

3451 

3452 # Topic categories card — pills link to list pages; primary cat shows rank chip 

3453 topic_pill_section = None 

3454 if topic_categories_raw: 3454 ↛ 3455line 3454 didn't jump to line 3455 because the condition on line 3454 was never true

3455 parsed_cats = [] 

3456 try: 

3457 parsed = json.loads(topic_categories_raw) 

3458 raw_list = parsed if isinstance(parsed, list) else [str(parsed)] 

3459 except (json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError): 

3460 raw_list = [c.strip() for c in str(topic_categories_raw).split(",") if c.strip()] 

3461 for item in raw_list: 

3462 if "wikipedia.org/wiki/" in str(item): 

3463 try: 

3464 slug = str(item).split("/wiki/")[-1].rstrip("/") 

3465 name = unquote(slug).replace("_", " ") 

3466 if name: 

3467 parsed_cats.append(name) 

3468 except Exception: 

3469 pass 

3470 else: 

3471 clean = str(item).strip("\"'[]").strip() 

3472 if clean: 

3473 parsed_cats.append(clean) 

3474 

3475 if parsed_cats: 

3476 pill_palette = [ 

3477 "bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300", 

3478 "bg-violet-100 dark:bg-violet-900/40 text-violet-700 dark:text-violet-300", 

3479 "bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/40 text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-300", 

3480 "bg-pink-100 dark:bg-pink-900/40 text-pink-700 dark:text-pink-300", 

3481 "bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-900/40 text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-300", 

3482 ] 

3483 pills = [ 

3484 A( 

3485 f"{get_topic_category_emoji(cat)} {cat}", 

3486 href=f"/lists/category/{slugify(cat)}", 

3487 cls=f"text-xs font-medium no-underline hover:underline inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full {pill_palette[i % len(pill_palette)]}", 

3488 ) 

3489 for i, cat in enumerate(parsed_cats) 

3490 ] 

3491 topic_pill_section = Card( 

3492 H2("Topics", cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground mb-3"), 

3493 Div(*pills, cls="flex flex-wrap gap-2"), 

3494 body_cls="p-5", 

3495 ) 

3496 

3497 # Category distribution bars 

3498 cat_dist_card = None 

3499 if category_distribution: 3499 ↛ 3500line 3499 didn't jump to line 3500 because the condition on line 3499 was never true

3500 try: 

3501 dist = ( 

3502 json.loads(category_distribution) 

3503 if isinstance(category_distribution, str) 

3504 else category_distribution 

3505 ) 

3506 if isinstance(dist, dict) and dist: 

3507 total_dist = sum(dist.values()) or 1 

3508 bar_colours = [ 

3509 "bg-blue-400", 

3510 "bg-violet-400", 

3511 "bg-emerald-400", 

3512 "bg-pink-400", 

3513 "bg-amber-400", 

3514 "bg-indigo-400", 

3515 "bg-teal-400", 

3516 "bg-rose-400", 

3517 ] 

3518 bars = [ 

3519 Div( 

3520 Span( 

3521 f"{get_topic_category_emoji(cat)} {cat}", 

3522 cls="text-sm text-foreground w-44 shrink-0 truncate", 

3523 ), 

3524 Div( 

3525 Div( 

3526 cls=f"h-4 {bar_colours[i % len(bar_colours)]} rounded-r-full transition-all", 

3527 style=f"width:{min(100, round(count / total_dist * 100))}%", 

3528 ), 

3529 cls="flex-1 h-4 bg-accent rounded-full overflow-hidden", 

3530 ), 

3531 Span( 

3532 f"{round(count / total_dist * 100)}%", 

3533 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground w-10 text-right shrink-0", 

3534 ), 

3535 cls="flex items-center gap-3", 

3536 ) 

3537 for i, (cat, count) in enumerate(sorted(dist.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:8]) 

3538 ] 

3539 cat_dist_card = Card( 

3540 H2( 

3541 "Content Breakdown", 

3542 cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground mb-4", 

3543 ), 

3544 Div(*bars, cls="space-y-3"), 

3545 body_cls="p-5", 

3546 ) 

3547 except Exception: 

3548 pass 

3549 

3550 # ── Niche Leaderboard card ────────────────────────────────────────────── 

3551 leaderboard_card = None 

3552 if niche_leaderboard and primary_category: 3552 ↛ 3553line 3552 didn't jump to line 3553 because the condition on line 3552 was never true

3553 lb_rows = [] 

3554 for i, peer in enumerate(niche_leaderboard): 

3555 peer_id = peer.get("id", "") 

3556 peer_name = peer.get("channel_name", "Unknown") 

3557 peer_thumb = peer.get("channel_thumbnail_url") or "/static/favicon.jpeg" 

3558 peer_eng = float(peer.get("engagement_score") or 0) 

3559 peer_subs = int(peer.get("current_subscribers") or 0) 

3560 is_self = peer_id == creator_id 

3561 row_cls = ( 

3562 "flex items-center gap-3 py-2 px-2 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 border border-primary/30" 

3563 if is_self 

3564 else "flex items-center gap-3 py-2" 

3565 ) 

3566 lb_rows.append( 

3567 Div( 

3568 Span(f"{i + 1}", cls="text-xs font-bold text-muted-foreground w-4 shrink-0"), 

3569 Img( 

3570 src=peer_thumb, 

3571 alt=peer_name, 

3572 cls="size-7 rounded-full object-cover shrink-0", 

3573 ), 

3574 Div( 

3575 A( 

3576 peer_name, 

3577 href=f"/creator/{peer_id}" if peer_id else "#", 

3578 cls="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground hover:underline line-clamp-1" 

3579 + (" text-primary" if is_self else ""), 

3580 ), 

3581 Span( 

3582 format_number(peer_subs), 

3583 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground", 

3584 ), 

3585 cls="flex-1 min-w-0", 

3586 ), 

3587 Span( 

3588 f"{peer_eng:.2f}", 

3589 cls="text-xs font-bold text-blue-600 shrink-0", 

3590 title="Engagement score", 

3591 ), 

3592 cls=row_cls, 

3593 ) 

3594 ) 

3595 leaderboard_card = Card( 

3596 Div( 

3597 UkIcon("flame", cls="w-4 h-4 text-orange-500 mr-2"), 

3598 H2( 

3599 f"Top {primary_category}", 

3600 cls="text-base font-bold text-foreground", 

3601 ), 

3602 Span( 

3603 "by engagement", 

3604 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto", 

3605 ), 

3606 cls="flex items-center mb-3", 

3607 ), 

3608 Div(*lb_rows, cls="space-y-0.5"), 

3609 A( 

3610 f"See all {primary_category} creators →", 

3611 href=f"/lists/category/{slugify(primary_category)}", 

3612 cls="mt-3 block text-xs text-primary hover:underline text-right", 

3613 ), 

3614 body_cls="p-5", 

3615 ) 

3616 

3617 right_col = Div( 

3618 performance_card, 

3619 rankings_card, 

3620 *(leaderboard_card and [leaderboard_card] or []), 

3621 topic_pill_section, 

3622 cat_dist_card, 

3623 cls="flex flex-col gap-4", 

3624 ) 

3625 

3626 body_cols = Grid(left_col, right_col, cols_sm=1, cols_lg=2, cls="mb-6") 

3627 

3628 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

3629 # SECTION 4 — Similar creators rail 

3630 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

3631 similar_section = _render_similar_creators( 

3632 similar_creators or [], 

3633 primary_category, 

3634 country_code, 

3635 current_creator_id=creator_id, 

3636 ) 

3637 

3638 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

3639 # SECTION 5 — Sync / freshness footer 

3640 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

3641 sync_colour = { 

3642 "synced": "text-emerald-600", 

3643 "pending": "text-amber-600", 

3644 "error": "text-red-600", 

3645 }.get(sync_status, "text-muted-foreground") 

3646 sync_icon_map = {"synced": "check-circle", "pending": "clock", "error": "x-circle"} 

3647 sync_uk_icon = sync_icon_map.get(sync_status, "circle") 

3648 

3649 footer_section = Div( 

3650 UkIcon(sync_uk_icon, cls=f"w-3.5 h-3.5 {sync_colour}"), 

3651 Span(sync_status.title(), cls=f"text-xs font-semibold {sync_colour}"), 

3652 Span("·", cls="text-border mx-1"), 

3653 Span( 

3654 f"Updated {format_date_relative(last_updated)}", 

3655 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground", 

3656 ), 

3657 Span("·", cls="text-border mx-1"), 

3658 Span( 

3659 f"Synced {format_date_relative(last_synced)}", 

3660 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground", 

3661 ), 

3662 Span("·", cls="text-border mx-1"), 

3663 Span( 

3664 f"ID {creator_id[:8]}…", 

3665 cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground font-mono", 

3666 title=creator_id, 

3667 ), 

3668 cls="flex items-center justify-center flex-wrap gap-1 py-4 text-center", 

3669 ) 

3670 

3671 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

3672 # SECTION 5 — Category comparison box plots 

3673 # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 

3674 box_plot_section = render_category_box_plots(creator, category_stats) 

3675 

3676 return Div( 

3677 banner_section, 

3678 stats_row, 

3679 body_cols, 

3680 similar_section, 

3681 box_plot_section, 

3682 footer_section, 

3683 cls="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 pb-16 pt-6", 

3684 ) 

3685 

3686 

3687# ============================================================================ 

3688# HANDLE SEARCH PREVIEW CARD 

3689# ============================================================================ 

3690 

3691 

3692def render_creator_preview(handle: str, channel_info: dict, search: str = "") -> Container: 

3693 """Render preview card for new creator found via handle search. 

3694 

3695 Shows basic info from YouTube API with "Add to Database" button. 

3696 """ 

3697 channel_id = channel_info.get("channel_id") 

3698 title = channel_info.get("title", "Unknown Creator") 

3699 custom_url = channel_info.get("custom_url", handle.lstrip("@")) 

3700 thumbnail = channel_info.get("thumbnail", "") 

3701 description = channel_info.get("description", "") 

3702 subs = channel_info.get("subscriber_count", 0) 

3703 views = channel_info.get("view_count", 0) 

3704 videos = channel_info.get("video_count", 0) 

3705 country = channel_info.get("country") 

3706 

3707 return Container( 

3708 # Hero banner 

3709 Div( 

3710 H1( 

3711 "📍 Creator Found on YouTube", 

3712 cls="text-4xl font-bold text-foreground mb-2", 

3713 ), 

3714 P( 

3715 f"Found {handle} on YouTube. Add them to your database to track their stats.", 

3716 cls="text-lg text-muted-foreground", 

3717 ), 

3718 cls="mb-8", 

3719 ), 

3720 # Preview card 

3721 Card( 

3722 # Channel header with avatar 

3723 Div( 

3724 Div( 

3725 Img( 

3726 src=thumbnail or "/static/favicon.jpeg", 

3727 alt=title, 

3728 cls="w-24 h-24 rounded-full object-cover border-4 border-white shadow-lg", 

3729 ), 

3730 cls="flex-shrink-0", 

3731 ), 

3732 Div( 

3733 H2(title, cls="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground"), 

3734 P( 

3735 handle, 

3736 cls="text-lg text-muted-foreground font-mono", 

3737 ), 

3738 ( 

3739 Div( 

3740 get_country_flag(country), 

3741 Span( 

3742 country.upper(), 

3743 cls="ml-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground", 

3744 ), 

3745 cls="flex items-center mt-2", 

3746 ) 

3747 if country 

3748 else None 

3749 ), 

3750 cls="ml-6", 

3751 ), 

3752 cls="flex items-center mb-6", 

3753 ), 

3754 # Stats grid 

3755 Div( 

3756 Div( 

3757 P("Subscribers", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase"), 

3758 P( 

3759 format_number(subs), 

3760 cls="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-1", 

3761 ), 

3762 cls="text-center bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-4", 

3763 ), 

3764 Div( 

3765 P("Total Views", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase"), 

3766 P( 

3767 format_number(views), 

3768 cls="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-1", 

3769 ), 

3770 cls="text-center bg-green-50 rounded-lg p-4", 

3771 ), 

3772 Div( 

3773 P("Videos", cls="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase"), 

3774 P( 

3775 format_number(videos), 

3776 cls="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-1", 

3777 ), 

3778 cls="text-center bg-purple-50 rounded-lg p-4", 

3779 ), 

3780 cls="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6", 

3781 ), 

3782 # Description 

3783 ( 

3784 Div( 

3785 P("About", cls="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground mb-2"), 

3786 P( 

3787 description[:200] + ("..." if len(description) > 200 else ""), 

3788 cls="text-sm text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed", 

3789 ), 

3790 cls="mb-6", 

3791 ) 

3792 if description 

3793 else None 

3794 ), 

3795 # Action buttons 

3796 Div( 

3797 Form( 

3798 Input(type="hidden", name="handle", value=handle), 

3799 Input(type="hidden", name="channel_id", value=channel_id), 

3800 Input(type="hidden", name="channel_name", value=title), 

3801 Input(type="hidden", name="custom_url", value=custom_url), 

3802 Input(type="hidden", name="thumbnail", value=thumbnail), 

3803 Button( 

3804 "✅ Add to Database & Track Stats", 

3805 type="submit", 

3806 cls="w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-blue-500 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg hover:from-blue-700 hover:to-blue-600 transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg", 

3807 ), 

3808 method="POST", 

3809 action="/creators/add", 

3810 ), 

3811 A( 

3812 "← Back to Search", 

3813 href="/creators", 

3814 cls="block text-center text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground font-medium mt-4 no-underline", 

3815 ), 

3816 cls="border-t pt-6 mt-6", 

3817 ), 

3818 cls="max-w-2xl mx-auto", 

3819 ), 

3820 cls=ContainerT.xl, 

3821 ) 

« prev     ^ index     » next       coverage.py v7.13.5, created at 2026-05-02 01:39 +0000
